In 2009, our daughter was struck and killed by a drunk driver while she was working at a camp in Maine. Because our family is not from Maine, we asked two attorneys with whom we have worked and whose opinions we value and trust to vet an on-the-scene personal injury attorney in Maine.

As it turns out, their recommendation of Steve was well placed and his care and handling of our case was not only thorough, with extreme attention to detail, but he often metaphorically held our hands as he guided us through our extremely difficult, painful and emotional case. We are confident that every penny that could be recovered in wrongful death allowances was recovered from several parties.

The recovered monies were put into an estate fund and eventually disbursed to two scholarships and several other causes that our daughter would want to support.

He was compassionate, well-informed and persistent in pursuing the case to its successful conclusion. There was one tack we were interested in taking that Steve gently but firmly told us would be useless and costly ~ and he was absolutely right.

Steve is an amazing personal injury attorney but working with him goes far beyond his extensive legal knowledge and skill. He advised us on how to prepare for the driver’s plea and sentencing and helped us craft our victim impact statements. We flew back to Maine for the sentencing and he was with us every step of the way. His guidance, care and expertise made a sad and difficult day bearable.

In short ~ Steve is highly professional, knows Maine law inside out, and will pursue every avenue that is worth pursuing, while at the same time he will be forthright and honest about when it is best to step back and spare more legal expense, time and anguish.

I recently participated in a challenging mediation of a multi-party case in which Steven Mogul represented a party with a significant potential exposure.  I was impressed with Steven's thorough preparation for a difficult negotiating session and very effective use of the mediation process to accomplish his client's objective.

Attorney Steve Mogul represented me after a car crash caused by a kid who ran a stop sign at 55 mph into a major route.  I was listed as a likely fatality at the time of the crash, but didn't cooperate with that prognostication.  Steve completely handled the medical payments which were substantial, and even negotiated lower costs for me with the medical providers.  More importantly, he patiently kept after the kid's insurance company and got me a settlement that was almost triple their original offer to me.  Steve did a great job and I am very grateful.
I have worked with several of the attorneys in the firm. They are knowledgeable, responsive and really took the time to listen.  Highly recommend them!

reviews.text:
Had the worst experience ever. First time I ever “needed a lawyer” and I say the lightly cuz turns out I didn’t. But this guy made a big deal about me facing habitual status in the state of NH from a driving record dating back to 2016. Called him for advise and asked what the options were or what he could do to help. Didn’t get much transparency (which should have been my first red flag) but all he kept saying was, “there is multiple roads we can go down”

He knew I was scheduled to relocate to FL from NH and this situation was causing a barrier on that. Was told he will attempt getting some charges annulled from my record. Required $2,500 upfront just to look at my record. Then another $2,500 to show up to 1 hearing and request a continuance for me. He ended up doing absolutely nothing. But get me a 90 day continuance, and advised me that it would buy me time to drive my belongings to Florida and get situated and “hope to get a Florida drivers license and pray NH doesn’t notify Florida of my habitual offender status..

Well that didn’t work for me, my next hearing date arrived and worked out another continuance for myself and start researching what was needed and how to submit a request for annulment. So I found the 3 or 4 driving infractions dating back to 2016-2018 and submitted annulment requests for each charge to their respective courts. 60 days later and annulments were fulfilled and approved by judges. And my habitual offender status was vacated completely. And didn’t face losing my license for atleast a year.

My personal experience was horrible with this firm and would very admittedly not recommend if your issues involve traffic law. And could have saved myself $5,000

Gave him 1 years to make this incident right and nothing has come of it. So unfortunately it is now time to share my very poor experience.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Ward,

I am a bit confused by your recent post. First, contrary to your assertion you did not need a lawyer to avoid Habitual Offender status, I might suggest you did to avoid exposure to a 4-yr license suspension which would prevent you from obtaining your driver’s license in any other state. Moreover you would face a potential mandatory jail sentence of one year in jail if convicted of driving during that period.

As I recall, when you contacted me in October of 2023 you were in a very precarious position as you were facing a 2nd Habitual Offender hearing. The fee I quoted, and we recorded was for 2000.00 for the hearing to be conducted before your plan to relocate to Florida.

In our first phone conversation pre-representation, as I recall, you uttered expletives and hung up on me when I quoted my ordinary fee for these cases. However, I felt empathy for your situation and later called you back and explained my strategy to keep your NH driving privileges so you could move. I also pointed out before the hearing that there were legal questions and strategies to pursue later to defeat the entire procedure.

At the hearing, I was able to extend the final decision for 90 days to assess those strategies. You were effusive in your gratitude towards me for the outcome.

We received a new hearing date and I quoted you the fee for further work which you agreed to send. Since I never heard back from you, I assumed you did not have the resources and apparently utilized a strategy I mentioned after the 1st hearing.

As to any efforts you made or were able to accomplish, I cannot speak to. Nor can I address, nor understand, your statement I had “one year to make this right”. I had no legal or other obligation to you after my initial contact.

In any event, I do hope things worked out for you wherever you have located.
Really appreciate your trust in us Alfred

reviews.text: My case has not ended; the state of New Hampshire has not replied to a motion that I have filed with Rochester District Court to all ALL restrictions removed from me. I filed this motion on December 27, 2024. The civil restraining order placed against me has been automatically been rescinded, the plaintiff (Suzanne Carter) has not filed a continuation for the original restraining order against me. Civil restraining orders are automatically rescinded after 12 months. Stephen Brown my lawyer is not aware of civil restraining order processes? I never did receive a notice in the mail about my case ( all charges dropped, case dismissed). Stephan Brown informed me via telephone call December 17, 2024;  I would receive a copy in the mail of the courts decision. I went to the courthouse and requested a copy of the decision/verdict myself. As far as the annulment process, I will file a motion on this matter myself. I can no longer wait for your Law Office to act in expedient manner. I neither can afford the costs involved with your Law Office; along with all the other fees required by the State of New Hampshire to have this record removed and be permanently annulled. I'm extremely frustrated/disgusted about how long this process takes. I was informed in October 2024, that my case was being dismissed, and here it is January 2025, still awaiting on the courts decision on motions to have my property (firearms) relinquished to me from the Farmington Police Department. It seems that I was not informed or information was being withheld from me about how long this process would take. From the first meeting with Stephen Brown in Spring of 2024.

If you are looking for an attorney to help you with Social Security Disability, then look no further.  Gordon helped me through every step of the process and was always available to speak with.  Couldn't be more pleased and consider myself lucky to have found him.  You won't be disappointed!

reviews.ownerResponse: Good afternoon. I have no idea who this is, however, hiring an attorney can be costly. It is the unfortunate reality of litigation. And Maine is not a rich state - it is full of very hard working people who aren't made of money. As a result, I/we try really hard to work with our client and their finances. I am not sure you were a client, though, because, if you were, you would know that I/we regularly give our clients discounts and try to work with them however we can on their bills. You are hiding behind a fake profile, so that speaks volumes to me about this being a fake review that is just intended to smear me and my office. If you were truly a client, I'd ask that you simply call or email me and I can guarantee you that we can find some ways to reduce your overall bill. I am more than happy to work with you if you would like. This is an unfortunate and disappointing review, especially being a fake profile.

reviews.text: Ezra and his team have been phenomenal from day one. Always showing respect and helping navigate difficult situations, this is a team that has shown dedication, knowlegde, and compassion through the entire process. Being "straight-up" and honest about situations is a strength, and that is built on communication. Building a solid, respectful client-attorney relationship, and providing guidance and trust with grace is far and few between. Ezra has been critical in helping me feel not only heard and understood, but also answering any questions and concerns I had along the way. He, and his team have navigated diffucult situations while providing solace. I have, and will always recommend Ezra and his team to those who need legal guidance and a team who will stand beside you with knowledge and a solid ethical standpoint. I cannot thank Willey Law Offices enough.

Be very careful with this firm they will play both sides and run the time up to play therapist and act like they care. They will fight amongst each other while having their clients in the office. Lastly check the receipts as they will double charge!

I did not write this review for a reply as your intent is not to correct the wronging but to simply escape them. i wrote this to let people know my experience with this law firm. Have more input but decided to keep it out as it would get personal...
reviews.ownerResponse: Hello. We are very sorry to hear that you have had a negative experience with the office. As I/we tell everyone, communication is the number one most important aspect of any attorney-client relationship. Unless we know if there is an issue, we cant help address it. Including on the billing end. Unfortunately, I/we cant even begin to figure out who this might be so that we can try to go back and figure out what the issue may have been (including with billing), however, we would welcome a private email or call to discuss whatever the issue (s) was (were). Anytime any client has ever addressed any billing issue, we will certainly and diligently work to address it! The same is true for any issue - we try to be receptive to criticism and feedback and to make positive changes moving forward. Like everyone out there, we are not perfect - we are a group of people trying to help make a difference (in a positive way) for our clients. We work in a very high stress environment and doing (predominantly) family law can be very stressful, for everyone involved, including the lawyers. Without knowing more, we simply cant respond. At Willey Law Offices we try our very hardest to meet the needs of our clients and to provide top quality service. This is certainly a disappointing review to see and we will certainly take from it what we can so that we can make sure to do better moving forward. But as I said, without knowing more, we are quite limited in how we can respond. Please consider reaching out to us privately to discuss whatever the issue was so that we can address it. We will certainly strive to do better moving forward. Thank you.

reviews.text: I'm not sure this space is enough to justify how much Ezra and his team have done for me and my family. I first reached out to Ezra in July of 2024, more than a year into my extremely high conflict divorce case. I reached out to him when no one was even listening to me, let alone helping me, and as a mom I was desperate for help. He heard me, and immediately went to battle for me and my family. He fought, relentlessly, for us and at the end of our very long case, we prevailed and my child is safe. Knowing that Ezra and his team will continue to be there for us and immediately start the fight again as needed brings me an overwhelming since of relief and faith that things really will be ok now. I truly could not be more happy or grateful.
Ezra and Kayla were wonderful to work with.  They took the time to hear me and understand my concerns and my case.  They were always kind and patient and well organized.

reviews.text: I cannot even begin to say what an incredible person Chris is…he is kind, funny, professional and incredibly knowledgeable! Attorney L’hommedieu(Chris) was terrific to work with. He was professional, personable, and knowledgeable. He was able to guide me on some very important financial issues in an honest and thoughtful way by answering my questions and providing guidance promptly. He truly changed my life for the better. I will be forever grateful to him and his staff for the help they provided at a critical time in my life.
Kind, understanding and patient!

When we first came to see Chris, we got seated on the couch in the lobby of his offices. My spouse and I sat there agitated, scared, and confused about our current financial situation and our current messy reality. We almost got off of that couch and walked out the door once or twice because we felt so immobilized.

Thank goodness we stayed a few more minutes to be greeted by Chris's warm welcome. His genuine smile and authentic care immediately put us at ease; he completely assured us that we have every right as a human being on this planet to go through this process.

After just a few moments, he helped us take away our shame around this life changing decision, and he gave us so much hope.

Chris absolutely loves helping people turn their lives around. He is so passionate about this work. His attention to detail is superb. He is absolutely brilliant. He also has an amazing sense of humor, and it was guaranteed that every time we sat with him, we would learn a lot and laugh a lot -which brought so much lightness and play to a very heavy and dark experience.

Chris took so much time with us through email correspondences, phone calls, and in person visits. His humility is palpable and refreshing.

When we left his office for our last visit after signing the final bankruptcy papers, I said to my spouse, "I was sad to leave this last visit, because I actually was having fun..."

In the end, the whole experience was educational and transformative. Chris, with so much grace, savviness, and devotion, helped change the course of our lives.
reviews.ownerResponse: This brought a tear to my eye.  Thank you.  It was a great pleasure getting to know you both - not to mention the loaves of bread!  Thank you for that.

reviews.text: My experience at D&D with Danelle Milone and Bill Kennedy continues to exceed my optimistic expectations.They both are extremely capable, excellent communicators and they really care.

Had a very good experience working with Danelle Milone at D&D. This was my first experience working with a lawyer and she was a great communicator, prompt and walked me through each step of the process. I will definitely reach out if I need representation in the future and I'll be recommending her to anyone I know looking for a lawyer as well!

My experience with Drummond & Drummond, Llp, and more specifically associate attorney Matthew K. Simone, was absolutely horrible. I approached the firm for help in a dispute between myself and a property management company that was managing my condo in Portland. Matthew K. Simone was assigned to my engagement and initially pitched a legal position that would challenge the property managers' rights and authorizations but once I signed the engagement letter with Drummond, our position immediately changed to a completely different strategy. Despite my immediate concerns about the pivot, Matthew reassured me this was the best approach. This assurance continued for nearly 6 months until I received a communication that "things have not progressed as he had hoped". Matthew Simone consistently mismanaged my expectations through the entire process telling me one thing, but the reality was something completely different.

The net result for me was a massive pile of legal bills yet to be revealed, no assistance from the property manager, and a legal demand letter from my tenants threatening to sue me based on the miscommunications Matthew Simone had with their attorney. I escalated my concerns to Scott E. Herrick, a partner at Drummond. Scott heard my concerns with Matthew Simone, and after my tenants threatened to sue me, Scott's next response was the final bill from his firm to me. I successfully negotiated the final bill with Scott E. Herrick to a reduced amount, but still paid a significant amount of money for a result that was completely avoidable.

I would be appalled if the firm and Matthew Simone recommended the same course of action for a similar legal dispute with any potential client in the future as it would be entirely irresponsible and a waste of resources and time. I feel as if I paid for junior associate Matthew Simone to cut his teeth on a legal dispute he had no right representing me for as his lack of experience and skills were clearly evident over the six months I worked with him. I am considering filing a formal complaint with the Maine State Bar Association against Matthew Simone for his miscommunications throughout this engagement that directly led to a negative legal result.

I hired Thomas Nale as my Divorce Attorney, and he completely blotched my Divorce Agreement when drafting the final agreement that I signed because I trusted that it was done to reflect the agreements made at the final hearing and during our mediations. Attorney Nale left out so many important details that I as a client wouldn't know to look for, especially when discussed just days before, I assumed everything to be accurate and complete!!! Unfortunately this wasn't the case and I trusted him as my Attorney so I signed it!! I didn't know that I would have to bring a calculator with me to figure out square feet in property measurements before signing!!! Now I've lost many acres of property to my ex-husband thanks to Attorney Nales negligence and errors!! Attorney Nale was hired by ME, to represent ME, and now I've LOST SO MUCH because of him, and my ex-husband has gained so much more than what we agreed upon!! Thanks to Attorney Nale, my ex-husband now owns the majority of my deceased parents property for which my dad's ashes are on!!! Hiring Attorney Nale has been the biggest mistake in my entire life and his negligence will affect the rest of my life!! He refused to fix HIS mistakes because my retainer ran out!! So I paid thousands of dollars for an attorney to ruin my life!!! I also am filing a complaint to the OVERSEERS OF THE BAR due to some unethical statements that he has made and some rules that he has broken in order for me to be able to hire him. DO NOT TRUST THIS MAN. If anyone wants any further details of what he did, and neglected to do, just comment, I'll be happy to share and details. I want the public to be aware!!
BTW...Attorney Nale attended my final divorce hearing while driving in his car and his cell signal kept going in and out!! Just one more detail I thought would be important to mention.

wish they could have helped me but the attractively priced consult does not match the cost of retaining. The consult was over quickly because he knew I couldn't afford it.

I think you should raise the prices of the consult as to not give people a false hope.

Thank you Tom you have a forever client now.

How this man is able to practice law is beyond me. I've had dealings with this Thomas nail his dad is a judge at skowhegan district Court he shouldn't even be allowed to step foot in that building but yet he's allowed there as well as allowed to violate our laws he requests certain mediators which is a conflict of interest. The fact we allow lawyers to practice but yet things like polygraph tests are a staple in our legal system is a very big indicator of a broken system, maybe 2% of people can fake a polygraph but yet we pay lawyers to lie manipulate and bend the truth. Maine needs to wake up and have a massive overhaul of our legal system there needs to be organizations to keep lawyers and our courtrooms from this rampant corruption that's going on.

NY re: Merriam 36 N.E. 505 1441 S. 0.1973, 14 L. Ed. 287
if you're curious about the truth Google the above code somewhere along the way people have forgotten that the government works for us not the other way around.

I retained these attorneys to assist, and the only thing that I was told by them is that I should go get a job with a car parts company or a hardware store. As previously mentioned, it is a back injury, and my advocate has advised me to get a job at places that have nothing but heavy requirements. If I were able to lift heavy things, I would return to my six figure job, gladly!! I will apparently have to find a job so that my family and I don't become homeless after 35 years of work, but I do appreciate the input from my so called advocate, that obviously doesn't know what I retained him for!! Unlike reviewers like the one who signed their name as "John Q. Public", I have no problem with identifying myself when I post reviews, good or bad. The firm Walker & Varney has been a legal practice I've done business with for years. Before me, my father did the same for decades. The firm has kept pace with the challenging estate issues that have arisen particularly in New Hampshire as lakefront properties increased in value 100-fold or more during the last 30 years. Randy Walker, Esq., has proven to be especially helpful to me and my wife in architecting our own solutions that define how our assets are to be handled as they pass from one generation to the next. He has represented other interests I am aware of, and they all speak highly of his intellect and integrity. These family-law issues are complicated--but important--stuff. You don't want your heirs to pay attorneys and related court fees for the probate process if you already know exactly how your want your assets to be handled. If you're trying to "sort it all out" the way we were a few years ago, find someone competent and trustworthy to help you. If your property is in New Hampshire, you'll likely find a very competent and helpful resource in this Wolfeboro-based firm. -- Brackett Tucker, property owner in Sanbornville, NH

After suffering a traumatic dog attack, I attempted to meet with Attorney Robert Levine on December 19, 2024, at our scheduled time of 4:00 PM. He never showed. Only after I had already arrived and left did he call to say he was in court. I gave him the benefit of the doubt and met with him twice more. During those meetings, he assured me—face to face—that he would take my case on contingency. He collected my emergency room and plastic surgery records, spent time gathering all relevant details, and even stated he would be sending a demand letter to the responsible party in March.

Now, four months later, after dragging this out and giving me false hope, he suddenly informs me that he’s refusing to take the case after all—claiming it’s “too risky” because the dog owner didn’t have insurance. This is something that should have been determined from the beginning—not after wasting months of my time, during which I could have pursued another attorney.

This conduct is beyond unprofessional. I came to Mr. Levine in a vulnerable state, looking for help and accountability, and instead was met with empty promises, poor communication, and a complete lack of follow-through. Do yourself a favor and find an attorney who values your time and your trauma—not someone who leads you on and backs out when it no longer suits them.

Awesome service

He is one of the best lawyers that I know or have seen doing their job. He does everything.... Criminal, civil family, and lawsuits. He has done me and others I know extremely well on the criminal side, and I had him take care of a lawsuit for me also, which he made sure I got what was fair. He really truly puts the work in to do the best for you, and that's whether you have him court appointed or if you're paying him directly. He also has taken care of social security for me. I know him on the outside world out of legal business also and he is a very kind hearted, caring & generous person. I have recommended numerous friends and family members and they have ALL been completely satisfied with the outcome.
Highly professional outstanding in his field and just a genuinely nice guy
An excellent attorney.
Updating our will, was quick but efficient.

My mother needed some help with a property  in probate after the death of her husband. Everyone in the office was nothing but compassionate and above all competent. I would recommend them to anyone needing help with property litigation.

Attorney Mills is definitely who you want in your corner no matter what your legal needs may be! She is incredibly professional and knowledgeable. Attorney Mills genuinely heard everything I had to say, sincerely cared, and was highly effective at coming up with plans and solutions for my needs. Attorney Olivia Mills has truly been a blessing in my life!

Attempted to have a simple purchase and sale agreement drawn up. I received no responses to my emails after the initial phone contact. Received a very harried call from Krysten Fabri-Smith confirming one item about the property. She had not seen a copy of the warranty deed but went ahead writing the agreement up. It contained numerous mistakes, including misspelling my name. Called and left a message for her to call me back. It's been 12 days and I've not heard back from her. I will not be pursuing this further with this firm.
Knowledgeable. Competent. Friendly.

Really great law firm!  Our family is involved with estate planning and some complicated real estate issues.  We could not be more pleased with the service and expertise of our attorney, Olivia Mills, and the other staff members we have had contact with.  Nathan and Kim have both been exceptional.  We highly recommend this firm!
Excellent lawyers and always friendly to everyone. Reasonable rates for all your needs.
Always professional and very helpful.

I had a not so good experience in family court. Attorney Mills is unprofessional an unorganized. Did not use anything I gave her on the opposing party. Sat back in court did nothing to represent me. Let me get Grilled by the dependent attorney. Kudos to Him he did his job. Attorney Mills did nothing She said she was going to do. Expected me to have information. The day of Court. If you have any Family Court Matters don't Hire. ATTORNEYS MILLS.
My wife and I have used this law office for 40 years. Could not ask for better.

I didn't visit the Law Firm, but they were very helpful in answering the questions I had. Thanks Griffin & Jordan, I'll make sure to acknowledge your assistance, so everyone knows how wonderful you people are.
Very professional.
Wonderful, efficient, and practical assistance from all staff. Highly recommend.
Very professional in helping close on the first house I have ever sold.  Thank you!
Honest, law abiding, law promoting.
David was organized and professional. He made our house closing super easy.
David was our atty for your home closing and refinancing. Very professional, well organized and explained all details thoroughly. Made a long process more enjoyable.
Attorney never kept a scheduled phone consultation with me his paralegal scheduled. This was concerning my mother’s death at assisted living facility here in Maine.

I was in a car accident 2 years ago that was not my fault and seeked help from Christian Foster right away. Christian was amazing to work with and so was his assistant, Rose. I would highly recommend to anyone. Their communication was excellent. I felt like I was compensated more than fairly for what I endured and I barely had to lift a finger. No one wants to be in a position to have to hire an attorney, but if you do know that you are in great hands with Christian Foster and Rose Sullivan. They will take care of you!

After seven long years of wanting to settle our car accident claim, Christian was a godsend.  He and Rose worked countless hours to help come to an agreement and settlement.  I can not thank them enough for all of their hard work, time, and dedication to my case!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are pleased to hear Christian and Rose were able to assist effectively in settling your car accident claim after so many years.

reviews.text:
Christian Foster is a rare species among personal injury lawyers...he invests not only his intricate legal knowledge and extensive experience, but his sincere humanity.

I spoke with a number of attorneys in his field before working with Foster Law.

Noone else really comprehended that my slip and fall case was about way more than physical injury or monetary wins. It was a heartbreaking and traumatic personal loss that Christian immediately saw and empathized with. His representation of my case never forgot that as he continually treated me with the utmost respect and compassionate understanding.

And despite formidable delays and obstacles created by Covid and the insurance company, Christian persevered in creative ways, always with the highest integrity and my unique interests and concerns in mind.

The case settled in a satisfactory manner only because of Christian's high level professional and personal skills.

I was involved in a MVA 3 1/2 years ago sustaining a neck injury that required further procedures and therapies. Attorney Ridge and her dedicated team at Berman & Simmons helped me navigate the legal process from start to my final settlement. I have the utmost confidence and respect in this firm in helping others that have been injured and in need of legal help during the overwhelming process. I feel that this office is truly the best at what they do!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Jim,

Thank you for sharing your experience. We’re pleased to hear that Attorney Ridge and her team were able to support you through the legal process and help you reach a resolution. Your trust and recommendation mean a great deal to us.

reviews.text: I highly recommend utilizing this firm to represent you, particularly Mike Bigos and his team are excellent.  They represented my son w a disability who had been a passenger in a car accident so well.  I highly recommend and are so grateful for the thoughtfulness and care in how they represented our son. It's difficult navigating life who has challenges, tho their expertise in this field also speaks of the excellence in the representation and claim they achieved for our son.  This will greatly benefit his life!
reviews.ownerResponse: Chris and Karen, We appreciate your thoughtful note of thanks. We’re grateful that our paths met and we were able to help you and your family. Though the work we do is often difficult because of the tragic circumstances our clients face, we meet so many wonderful people in the process. It’s so satisfying to us when we can bring resolution, peace, and financial stability to help make our clients' lives better.

reviews.text: Highly recommend this team!
reviews.ownerResponse: Linda, we appreciate your 5-star review and high recommendation.

reviews.text: After numerous other firms wouldn’t even return my inquiries, I was blessed to be referred to Berman & Simmons. They were extremely empathetic and professional in the handling of my personal injury / unsafe product liability case. My primary interest was in drawing the appropriate attention to an unsafe product that poses a significant threat to its users. Their representation in this matter undoubtedly served as a catalyst for change in hopefully preventing further injuries and loss to others in the future.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jonathan, we're so glad you were referred to Berman & Simmons to help you shine a light on an unsafe product. Our work together will undoubtedly serve as a catalyst for change and protect others in the future. We appreciate you leaving this review!

reviews.text: I recently secured the services of Berman & Simmons Law Firm.  The team assigned to me was Attorney Christopher Boots,  Paralegals Katie Poussard/Sue Cullerton.  My experience has been extremely positive with these people.   They are responsive, detailed, caring, compassionate and truly work to their client's benefit and only have their client's best interest at heart.   I highly recommend anyone needing a personal injury firm to contact not only the firm of Berman & Simmons, but specifically Attorney Christopher Boots, Katie Poussard and Sue Cullerton.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Amy,

Thank you for taking the time to provide your feedback about attorney Chris Boots and his amazing team! It’s unfortunate that you needed to secure a personal injury law firm, but we’re so glad you found Berman & Simmons. Like Chris and his team, the attorneys and staff here are often recognized for their caring and compassionate client service.

Thanks again for your 5-star review and future recommendations. We really appreciate it.

reviews.text: Michael and his paralegal Erika at Berman & Simmons were outstanding. Michael’s expertise and dedication, paired with Erica’s thoughtful check-ins by both email and personal phone calls, made me feel truly supported. The firm’s unwavering commitment and compassion showed at every step—I always felt my case really mattered to them. Their hard work made all the difference in achieving a successful outcome, and I am deeply grateful. I highly recommend their team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Jennifer,

Thank you for your kind words for attorney Mike Bigos and his paralegal, Erika - your feedback means a lot to us. You pointed out many things that make our teams so great...expertise, dedication, thoughtful follow-up, support, commitment, hard work, and compassion. Our focus is always on a successful outcome and we also want to make our clients feel supported throughout the process.

reviews.text: We were very grateful for the work Berman & Simmons did for us. Mike Bigos was very professional and helpful. All the staff were diligent and we felt well represented and cared for throughout the entire process.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Garrett,
Thank you for taking time to provide your feedback about attorney Mike Bigos and his great staff! We're especially glad you felt cared for during the process. We know how hard it is to be involved in a personal injury case and want to make the process as easy as possible for our clients.

reviews.text: Attorney Travis Brennan represented me in my personal injury lawsuit resulting from a motor vehicle accident in which I suffered a severe brain injury. He is tremendous and I am 100% pleased with the legal services he and his team provided. Travis is a superbly skilled trial attorney and such a kind and compassionate person. From the start of my case and throughout, I was well informed of how it was progressing and what to expect next.  I was always able to reach Attorney Brennan when a question or need arose.  I was consulted on decisions with choices clearly explained to me; I never felt pressured, but rather, well informed and heard.  I was most pleased with the outcome of my case and am extremely grateful for the fine legal services, care and respect I received from attorney Brennan and his team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Laurie,

Many thanks for your review about attorney Travis Brennan and his amazing staff. Your feedback acknowledged the type of customer service and expertise we provide: trial skills, kindness, compassion, setting expectations, clear communication, availability, care, and respect. We’re very sorry about your vehicle accident and resulting brain injury and we’re very glad we were able to help you through this difficult time.

We wish you the very best.

reviews.text:
To the amazing staff at Berman & Simmons and my Attorney Chris Booth. Thank you so much for everything you have done for me and my son's. I don't know what I would have done without you. Thanks to you, I can now imagine a brighter future for me and my son's. This has been a rough journey and I am glad I had you at my side. You are by far the Best Law firm in Maine. I will tell everyone about your good works. Thank you once again.

Willie Wiggins
reviews.ownerResponse:
Willie,

Thank you for taking the time to provide this feedback about Berman & Simmons and attorney Chris Boots. Despite what brought you and your son to us for legal representation, we’re very glad we were at your side and able to provide a better future for both of you.

Thank you also for your future referrals – we greatly appreciate it.

reviews.text: Fantastic team of Professionals. Easy to communicate with, always available, supportive, and incredibly effective. Honest and upfront about financials and timelines etc. I could not ask for more and I have high expectations. During a tough time when the stakes were high, these folks came through like Rainmakers and I owe them, and I will stick with them. Highest possible praise!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Chris,

Thanks for taking time to leave this great review. We’re glad our high expectations met your high expectations!

We know people only come to us when they’re facing a difficult and sometimes life-altering situation. When the stakes are high for our clients, our team is ready to provide the support and expertise they need to get their lives back on track.

reviews.text:
I never imagined I would need legal representation, but no one expects life’s worst events. I was referred to Berman & Simmons and had the great fortune of being represented by Attorney Kristin T. Murray-James, along with the paralegal team of Tiffany S. Mullins and Alana E Mallar.

Our case presented many challenges, but Attorney Murray-James and the paralegal team consistently demonstrated empathy, professionalism, and unwavering support. Attorney Murray-James and her team were sensitive to our fears and concerns, and I felt completely confident placing my trust in their capable hands. With compassion and expertise, they guided us through a complex process and helped us reach a positive outcome.

Attorney Murray-James takes a truly human-centered approach to her work. She never loses sight of what her clients are going through while maintaining the strength and determination necessary to advocate effectively. Attorney Murray-James’s holistic, thoughtful care made a lasting impact—not only did she navigate difficult legal matters with skill, but she also helped us find the strength to move forward.

In one of the darkest chapters of our lives, they were our light—fierce advocates, compassionate listeners, and unwavering allies.

I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Murray-James and her outstanding paralegal team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
JP,

Thank you for your incredibly sweet and heartfelt feedback regarding attorney Kristin Murray-James and her team. Your kind words mean so much to us and really highlight what we strive for: a human-centered approach to our work and fierce advocacy for our clients.

It truly is our privilege to be able to help our clients get their lives back on track after serious personal injury. We’re so glad we were able to help you.

reviews.text: This was my first time needing a lawyer, and I was nervous because I wasn’t sure if my situation even justified legal help. However, Chris took the time to explain everything clearly, including all possible outcomes, which really put my mind at ease. He kept me informed throughout the entire process and worked diligently on my behalf. I was very satisfied with his professionalism, service, and the outcome.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Randi,

Thank you for this note and kind words about Attorney Chris Boots. The attorneys at Berman & Simmons appreciate and understand the apprehension people feel about reaching out to us and make it a priority to put their minds at ease with professionalism, clear communication, and kindness. Despite your situation, we’re glad you had a positive experience with us.

Richard,
We appreciate you taking time to leave this 5-star review. We're glad you had a positive experience with us!

reviews.text: I’m going to cut to the chase here and give 5 stars to Berman and Simmons! My experience with this law firm has been exceptional from day one of meeting with Attorney Michael Bigos to the final settlements. I’m a survivor of some serious trauma and was initially nervous about calling a law firm. However, I learned that Attorney Bigos has aquired specialized training to understand the effects of trauma on individuals, and how to recognize signs of trauma in order to create a safe and supportive environment to best represent his clients. Attorney Bigos understands that trauma can significantly impact a person’s communication, behavior, and ability to navigate the legal system. I had no worries with Attorney Bigos on my side, because it wasn’t just him caring about my case… I had a team at this law firm! When you first call Berman and Simmons there will be an intake from a Paralegal that will listen to your situation. I spoke with Erika Lindstrom (Paralegal for Attorney Bigos) who provided a very calming environment and clear communication, which made me feel comfortable and safe. Most importantly, I felt believed, and was provided with support groups (as well as other resources) to help me heal. I didn’t expect that, and was very pleased with all the extra that Berman and Simmons provided to me. They totally went above and beyond. Moreover, Attorney Joseph Gousse was close by to assist. A trauma-trained lawyer as well, Joseph was present for meetings to help; and, from the first moment we met, his personal aura radiated as truly genuine. I highly recommend Berman and Simmons for any personal injury case that has caused you trauma. I feel like a giant weight has been lifted off my shoulders. Thank you, Berman and Simmons!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Leigh,

We appreciate you getting straight to the point and providing this incredibly thoughtful review about Attorneys Mike Bigos and Joe Gousse, and their team! The trauma-informed training our attorneys and staff has received sets us apart from other law firms and allowed us to provide a comfortable, safe and calming environment for your healing and recovery. Beyond the injury, we look at the whole person to make sure we’re supporting all their needs. We’re so happy that giant weight was lifted off your shoulders and you had such a positive experience with us.

Thank you for sharing your feedback and making sure others know about the services.

reviews.text:
I recently had the pleasure of working with Berman & Simmons Trial Attorneys, and I cannot recommend them highly enough. Their professionalism throughout my nearly four-year-long case was evident in every interaction. The team (Susan, Abigail, Diane, Cat, and many others) displayed exceptional competence, navigating complex legal matters with ease and providing clear, insightful guidance every step of the way.

What truly stood out, however, was their compassion. They treated my family and me with the utmost respect and understanding, taking the time to listen to our concerns and ensuring we felt supported during a challenging time. Their dedication to their clients is both admirable and reassuring.

My family and I are extremely happy with the end results of our case. We are very grateful and thankful Berman & Simmons represented us.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Tony,

It's so heartwarming to receive your feedback about attorneys Susan Faunce and Abaigeal Ridge, and their team members. We're glad you felt supported and respected during this difficult time. We appreciate your kind words and for trusting us to help you navigate your case.

Thank you!

reviews.text:
My husband had a serious car accident requiring months of medical care. He was not at fault. Medicare was paying month after month for the accidents injuries. I was overwhelmed dealing with Bills daily pain issues, medical bills and letters from Medicares third part dealing with accidents. Exhausted, I called Berman & Simon's! They saved my life. They lifted 500 pounds off of my shoulders trying to take care of bills, hospitals, doctors and rehabilitation appointments. I was 77 years old.
My husband recovered after three years. We are so very grateful for taking our case. They were professional and compassionate. We highly recommend them.       Diane and William Horton, Deer Isle, Maine
reviews.ownerResponse:
Diane,
We're so sorry your husband experienced a serious car accident and you both had to face the difficult and lengthy aftermath of that situation. But we're so glad you reached out to us and we were able to provide the care and support you needed while your husband recovered. Thank you for trusting us.

We appreciate your kind words.

reviews.text:
Mr. Kenlan is an upstanding individual in our community. He really goes above & beyond to help others, not only his clients.

This is a man who LISTENS & does what is best for his clients.

Couldn't recommend him MORE, he's a big asset to the Berman & Simmons team.

Thank you for your help, guidance & for making things happen.

Shivam,

We couldn't agree more with your feedback about attorney Tim Kenlan!

Thank you for taking time to provide this review. We greatly appreciate it.

reviews.text: I received outstanding legal representation from Berman & Simmons and would recommend their attorneys to anyone who has been injured or suffered harm at the hands of others. In addition to bringing the case to a successful conclusion, my attorneys always treated me with dignity and respect throughout the process.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Ashbel,
Despite the factors that brought you to Berman & Simmons, we're glad you had such a positive experience with us. It's so heartwarming to receive this feedback. Thank you.

Thank you also for your future recommendations. We appreciate it.

reviews.text: This was my first time working with a personal injury attorney. I had no idea what to expect and they made sure to lay everything out and explain every possible outcome. They answered all my questions no matter how big or small they were. When they tell you they have your best interest they mean it. It felt nice knowing that my case was in good hands.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Alexus,
Thank you, thank you for your feedback! We realize people generally don't have experience working with a personal injury attorney and we want to make the process as easy as possible for them. We're glad you felt supported and in good hands.

reviews.text: Anyone who gets to work with Attorney Kristin Murray-James will have the benefit of a caring, thoughtful, and intelligent source of counsel. She is people-centric and dedicated to those that find themselves in need of legal help. I strongly recommend the advocacy and guidance of Attorney Murray-James. She is a wonderful person and a wonderful attorney.

Kate,
We greatly appreciate your wonderful feedback about Attorney Murray-James and couldn't agree more with your kind words!

reviews.text: A real professional who is also a real human. Jeremy is kind, honest, and excellent at his job. He communicates effectively and timely. Jeremy is patient, pleasant, and is truly a Mainer helping other Mainers! I would give this guy 10 stars if I could 🙌

I gave him the benefit of the doubt and thought he may be on vacation or something, but this was not the case.  Found another review elsewhere that said that they were also ignored.  My friend, who referred me, was ignored on a small piece of advice she was seeking this spring.  Unresponsive.  Do not recommend. Had to scramble for last minute representation with another lawyer.
Sunday's 1pm to 1am nice mix of good music and food .

Jeremy Dean is an amazing lawyer. He has gone above and beyond to do everything in his power to help my fiancé and I with his son. He takes his time and makes sure he doesn’t miss one single detail. Unlike other lawyers he cares about his clients and does whatever he can to get them the best outcome, we are so grateful for you!

reviews.text:
Booking an initial conversation with Leslie was the best thing I’ve done for our relationship. I felt comfortable that I knew what we should do, but she asked questions to understand our relationship, goals, and timeline, and made a different recommendation. The next best thing I’ve done was trusting her guidance.

Bringing someone you love from a country foreign to you into a country foreign to them is an emotional rollercoaster. Knowing that we had the support and expertise of Leslie was incomparable, especially in today’s world. We will continue working with her and Kristin for all of our next needs, and already recommend her highly when asked.

Leslie, Kristin, and Maine Immigration Attorneys, thank you!! Without this amazing firm my husband and I would’ve been absolutely lost. Thankfully, every step of the way, their firm made sure we knew what was going on and helped us reach our overall goal of helping my husband immigrate to America. I HIGHLY recommend this firm and openly/often credit them when telling my friends and family about our immigration process. We couldn’t be more happy and satisfied with their work for us. From the bottom of our hearts, thank you all!! ❤️

From the initial consultation to the end of our case, we felt completely confident in Attorney Leslie and her team. She made it clear from the beginning that she takes on strong cases and works hard to win, which immediately gave us peace of mind. Throughout the entire process, Leslie and her assistant, Kirstin, were excellent at communicating what to expect and being honest about what could potentially go wrong in the current environment.

They were also incredibly supportive when preparing us for appointments, making sure we felt informed and ready every step of the way. We truly couldn’t have asked for a better experience or a better law firm. This is a results-driven team that genuinely cares about their clients, and we are extremely grateful for their hard work and dedication.

Leslie and her staff guided me successfully through a complex and intimidating naturalization process. Her expertise resulted in me being granted US citizenship and end what I would describe as the most stressful 6 months of my life leading up to final ceremony.
Very thorough, organized and responsive lawyers. 100% recommended.

Highly recommend using Maine Immigration Attorneys for all your needs. They were very helpful and patient throughout the process, making sure we understood everything along the way. We felt prepared through the entire process and the interview went very smooth and successful for us. Leslie and her team were always there to answer any questions we had. Thank you everyone!
Excellent from start to finish. Leslie was professional, prepared, and answered all of our questions. Would definitely recommend!

My partner and I met with Leslie Silverstein who was so kind, knowledgeable and very responsive to our many questions about our case that we hired her on the spot to represent us in our green card case. The cost was up front so you never had to worry about getting nickel and dimed through the whole process. It can be a very stressful process and I am very glad we chose to with Leslie as it gave us confidence in our decisions and allowed us to plan out our lives when it felt like we were in limbo. Can't recommend them enough.
Great experience having the attorney working on our case.
We had a wonderful experience with Leslie and her firm, and we felt secure and well-advised through the whole immigration process!
Every good and fast working I recommend anyone
Leslie and Kristin were fabulous, helping us successfully through the immigration process. I don't know what we would have done without them. Would definitely recommend!
Excellent and Outstanding service ,very professional team , highly recommend
Great and easy explanation, respond fast, nice people, good job. Highly recommended👏🏻

We didn't hire them when we first started our immigration process because money was tight. Upon hindsight I wish I had. The fee may seem a lot but with the time you will put into it is likely worth it. 100% give them a call and take the consultation.

Maine's Imagination Attorney is nothing short of remarkable. Their unique approach to law, blending legal expertise with creativity, has transformed my legal journey into an inspiring adventure.

From the outset, it was clear that this attorney was unlike any other. Their office exuded creativity, setting the stage for what was to come.

What sets Maine's Imagination Attorney apart is their ability to harness the power of imagination to solve legal issues. They listen, understand, and translate ideas into actionable legal strategies. It's like having a legal magician on your side.

Communication was flawless, with complex legal matters explained in simple terms. This attorney empowers you with knowledge and fosters collaboration.

Their dedication and passion are inspiring, and they consistently go above and beyond to find creative solutions. Maine's Imagination Attorney is not just a legal representative; they are a visionary and a partner in achieving your dreams.

In summary, if you want an attorney who defends your rights and fuels your imagination, choose Maine's Imagination Attorney. Their legal expertise combined with their imaginative approach is a winning combination. My experience with them has been life-changing, turning my dreams into reality. Highly recommended!

I just became a US citizen last Thursday 05/16/2024. With the helped of Kristin and Leslie my journey went very smooth though I can’t denied that I was very much terrified but they made me feel better and relax during processing. For every folks who are looking for immigration attorneys I 100% recommend these firm. I love working with Kristy and Leslie. They are so very keen to every detail regarding with your concerns and application.
🇵🇭 🇺🇸
Extremely understanding of my situations.  Very analytical and thorough. Will look forward to further discussion!
He is a wonderful attorney! He helped me and many others get our green card! He works very hard and professional! Jing Zhang
Working with Jon was an absolute pleasure.  His expertise is unmatched and I couldn’t be more grateful.

reviews.text:
Matt, Sarah, and Joanne exceeded all of my expectations throughout the entire process of my second OUI charge. Because my case was my second within 10 years and it was a refusal I was facing severe penalties with life altering consequences as well as 2 weeks jail time minimum. Matt's initial 1 hour free consultation went beyond the alotted time as he took extra time to describe each and every aspect of the process. Shortly after hiring the team I began to receive copies of all the paperwork, including requests for video evidence from the arresting police department. The heat was really getting turned up as the police reports and videos came rolling in. My behavior at the police station the day of my arrest was entirely unacceptable as Matt & I watched every painful second of the police station video footage twice from beginning to end looking for any lapse in protocol that would be to my benefit. Matt's knowledge of OUI law became even more evident as we watched the video. Matt did not make any false promises or get ahead of me in terms of leading me to believe one thing or the other regarding an outcome, what he did do was focus on application of the law, and he made sure all of my rights were upheld at every point of the arrest. Sarah, in fact, represented me at the BMV hearing and was able to emerge victorious completely eliminating an 18 month license suspension (Not including Secretary of State suspension of 3 years concurrent to BMV). Joanne notified me immediately of my license being reinstated after being suspended only 9 days. In the interim leading up to my trial Matt made sure to keep me posted on exactly what to do and expect as my date drew closer. He was excellent at getting back to my phone calls and e-mails and typically did within an hour or two unless he was in the courtroom. He also kept me informed of any details that would help me achieve the best possible outcome that tend to get overlooked, including writing letters and arriving to court early on a busy day. I could not have asked for a better outcome as my OUI charge was dismissed due to Matt's knowledge of OUI/refusal law. It is clear that Matt is highly respected in this field but also respected in the courtroom and by law enforcement. My endorsement is simple: Don't drink and drive, ever. It is foolish, stressful, and costly. On the other hand, good people make mistakes. Having Sarah, Matt and Joanne on your side is the only silver lining to a first, or second OUI charge. And, the more complicated and unsavory your case may be, the more I would recommend them.

Greg Day
Case Dismissed

I retained the services of Nichols and Webb after being arrested on an OUI charge.  I cannot imagine anyone, inside or outside of law enforcement and/or the legal profession that has a more thorough understanding of the numerous nuances and subtleties surrounding the legalities (and pitfalls) of the OUI arrest process, prosecution and defense than Attorney Matt Nichols.  He is meticulous in his review of the arrest record and scrutinizes every aspect for abnormalities in SOP by Law Enforcement personnel.  I would highly recommend Nichols and Webb for anyone finding themselves in the unfortunate position of being charged with this offense...  I believe you will find them to be your best alternative for a strong and creative (and hopefully, successful) defense.

Terrible lawyer who will tie up your case past the time limit then drop you like a hot potato if it can't be settled out of court. In his own words he won't try it if he can't win it, but he can't win it if he doesn't try it. Pick someone else if your case is complicated because you only have three years for malpractice. You don't need this guy tying up your case past that deadline and then dropping you because he doesn't want to go to court. Feel free to reach out if you want more details.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Our firm takes client concerns seriously and strives to provide diligent representation and clear communication throughout every matter. Legal matters, particularly divorce cases, can involve significant time, complexity, and court procedures, which can affect overall costs. We work to keep clients informed about fees and billing as matters progress.



Because we are bound by professional and ethical obligations of confidentiality, we cannot discuss the details of any client matter in a public forum. However, we welcome the opportunity to address concerns directly.



If you would like to discuss this further, please contact our office and we would be happy to speak with you.

It disgusting what these people do to the most vulnerable in our communities. Do your research and don’t back down from these fools!!!

When I first came to see Attorney Hodsdon, I was an emotional wreck. My whole world was crumbling. Attorney Hodsdon and his office staff became my lifeline. They invested time and effort in my case that I feel certain was not reflected in my bill. They successfully guided me through a difficult and lengthy case requiring multiple appearances in court. I witnessed Attorney Hodsdon transform from a mild mannered fatherly type to a fierce advocate for the benefit of myself and my children. There may be cheaper attorneys out there but when it comes to preserving your family and everything you own, cheap is not necessarily the main objective. I will never forget what Attorney Hodsdon and his staff did to help me through the most difficult time of my life.

If I could put no stars I would. Family had been working with him on my husband’s grandfather’s will. When the dispute was finally settled we received a check for a fair amount of money, only to have it taken back out of our account. When called to find out why they said it was done in error. I don’t understand how that kind of error could be made. It was careless, sloppy and damaging. They should be ashamed of themselves.

I had an agreed soon case with my ex regarding child support... He spent 15 min talking with me and charge me 2200 as well as an extra $25 weekly retainer which for 3 hours total of work ( being generous) is way over what its worth.. As a single mom I was completely taken advantage of.
He was honest and wasn't out to make you broke

Roger dealt with my multiple cases Cumberland and Androscoggin If you find yourself in a bad situation, this is the man to call. I did not see a way out or that anyone was going to help me and he helped me turn my life around and get out from underneath all the charges. I just had to do my half and he took care of all the legal half and made it so streamline, smooth and easy. He was very communicative. Just a great man I would highly recommend him to anybody who needs help. Truly a great man worth every penny <3 me and my baby boy thank you !
Roger is an excellent attorney and is rated as one of the best lawyers in the state of Maine. If you need a lawyer, Roger should be your first call!

I found Roger Burnell and put my trust in him. Roger has a good relationship with the court & they actually listen to his recommendations. Roger speaks to the DA & judge with confidence & conviction, like a boss. This is my first good experience & outcome with court & sentencing. I highly recommend you place your trust in this man, Roger Burnell. Ever step of the process was explained & I always felt like I was included the end result. Thank you!

Fastforward almost 2yrs, my case was opened up again. I added on another 8 charges, mostly felonies class B,&Cs. My differed disposition had what the court calls a "bad outcome". Roger definitely didn't leave me to the wolves, even though I gave him nothing good to work with. With some work on my end and alot of work on his, I ended with a better outcome than the first offer was originally. Thank you for all you efforts, and not giving up on me. We all make mistakes and its how we rise from the ashes, not how we fell into the fire that counts. Without help it is hard to do, thanks for the help.

Roger was an amazing professional. I couldn’t recommend him more if you find yourself in a situation that needs a true legal expert. Don’t hesitate to call Roger his detail and diligence to my case made all the difference and had the best outcome possible.
Roger represented me for a recent OUI case I had and he was fantastic and helpful through out the entire process! I would definitely reccomend hiring Roger and his team!

Roger was great at handling a domestic dispute case I had. He answered all my questions and was always very quick to respond back to me. He was able to get my case dismissed and I was able to move on from the experience! Thank you so much!

My case was recently settled, and I wanted to take the time to write the review that the Law Offices of Roger F. Brunelle, Jr. truly deserve. I work in the medical field and found myself facing a situation that could have jeopardized my livelihood, career, and everything I’ve worked so hard to achieve. I’m proud of the work I do for my community, and the thought of losing that was overwhelming.

Roger immediately recognized my anxiety about my career, my fear of unemployment, and the weight of the situation. After reviewing all the discovery, audio, video, and radio communications, he broke down the case layer by layer, in a way that made me feel informed, supported, and never like “the little guy.”

This was a complex case, and I was facing a second DUI/OUI charge, serious, life-changing allegations.

I could write at length about Roger’s professionalism, persistence, support, and respect, but I hope this review conveys even a fraction of what he did for me. He is truly at the top of his field. Even after your case is closed or continued, he remains committed to supporting his clients for as long as needed. This was not my first criminal matter, and I can confidently say that not every attorney is as genuine or dedicated as Roger.

I cannot thank him enough for protecting my career, restoring my sense of pride, and relieving the financial and emotional burden of a situation that should never have escalated the way it did. Life happens, but Roger took the time to listen and see me as a person, not just a case file.

For that, I am forever grateful to the Law Offices of Roger F. Brunelle, Jr.

If you need an attorney, Roger is your guy.  He was there for me every step of the way and got a great result. He explained things in a way I understood, was professional yet kind and understanding. You couldn't ask for anyone more attentive and responsive. Roger took an interest in me, not just my case. If I should need an attorney again, he would be my first phone call.

Roger is a true bulldog — exactly the kind of person you want in your corner. My son experienced a major fire loss that was investigated by both the insurance company and the state fire marshal. Roger immediately took control of the situation and made sure the insurance company did not dictate the terms of the recorded interview. The outcome was favorable, and I would highly recommend him to family and friends.

Attorney Brunelle was great to work with. He had solid communication, kept me in the loop and made sure I knew exactly what I had to do and when. He got me the best possible outcome on my case. Highly recommend

I am very thankful for Roger's help in my time of legal need. He was patient enough to translate "legalese" into english so I could understand and he truly fought for me even when I wasn't present. You can really trust him. Thank you Roger!

I truly can’t speak highly enough of Roger. As someone who once read these reviews in search of the right attorney, I’m now incredibly grateful to be leaving one of my own. Roger handled my cases with exceptional care and managed to significantly reduce the charges I was facing.

He is not only deeply knowledgeable, but also genuinely compassionate and empathetic — qualities that are rare and invaluable during such a stressful time. It’s clear that he’s in this work because he truly cares about helping people and he will go above and beyond for his clients.

Roger is simply the best, and I’ll always be thankful for the way he advocated for me and supported me through the entire process.

I am taking this time to share my experience with Roger brunell. He is a professional 100%. Passionate about his trade. He not only performed an outstanding services. I highly recommend Roger to anyone needing assistance with a legal matter. You will not be disappointed.

Roger was a pleasure to work with. He was able to get me a very favorable outcome. He made a very stressful process not so stressful! I 100% recommend Roger to anyone dealing with legal issues. He will work as hard as he can to get you the best possible outcome. Thank you Roger!

Having used Roger's services twice now, I highly recommend giving him a call! He is professional, knowledgeable, timely, and very well respected! You can tell he loves what he does, and treats you like a friend while winning your case!!
I have used roger in 2 different cases and we have won both cases. Roger is knowledgeable,diligent,professional,and personable. I would highly recommend roger brunelle to represent you.

The Milam law firm comes as my only recommendation for people who need defense against the unfortunate. They are swift, incredibly comprehensive and knowledgeable. I thank the firm for saving my fatherhood and everything I have worked for. I can't speak highly enough of them. Thank You!

I am incredibly grateful for the representation I received from my PFA attorney, Nicole Milam. My lawyer was extremely knowledgeable about PFA law, explained everything clearly, and advocated fiercely on my behalf in court. She was responsive, thorough, and genuinely cared about my safety and the well-being of my children. I never felt judged or dismissed—only empowered and protected.

“Outstanding Legal Representation”

I am incredibly grateful for the exceptional counsel and support I received from Attorney Nicole Milam during my recent case. Her professionalism, clear communication, and resourcefulness made a significant difference during a very challenging time.

Nichole is a perfect mixture of ferocity and intelligence. She is the best lawyer I've ever had represent me. Nichole Milam is a lawyer for the people.

Nicole Milam is amazing. I highly recommend her for anyone with a high conflict case.

reviews.text: Very professional and helpful with my business needs.

Just over a year ago a truck collided with me while riding my bike. I sustained serious injuries requiring two surgeries and ongoing rehabilitation. My Wife was left with how to proceed with hospitals, ambulance services, insurance companies, police communication and the future.

After a number of calls to friends, some attorneys , as to who best to represent us, Lauri Boxer- Macomber name came up. What a stroke of good fortune amidst a great deal of darkness. After that initial visit with her, all aspects of our case were under control. So helpful for my Wife and me. We were truly represented by a professional - the results impressive.

Cannot say enough about what Lauri accomplished for us.

Lauri Boxer-Macomber is hands down the best bicycle crash related attorney around!
I was hit by a driver while commuting to work. A friend referred me to her. I'm so glad I reached out. She is professional, kind, patient, hard working, friendly, and authentically cares for her clients.  I was concerned that the legal process would be grueling and frustrating, but turns out it was not that way thanks to Lauri. I felt confident in her abilities to advocate for me while being completely honest and open throughout the process. 5+ stars to Lauri and a huge thank you to she and her amazing staff.

In 2017, a driver hit me with his vehicle while I was commuting home by bicycle. I sustained some rather serious, non-life threatening, injuries and had to have surgery. As you can imagine, there were some issues with the insurance and liability. A lawyer I knew from my mountain biking community who practices other types of law told me that Lauri Boxer-Macomber at Kelly, Remmel & Zimmerman might be the best person to handle my bike case.  She was right. Lauri understood the law and issues well, worked hard on my difficult case, and got me a good result.  This was a huge relief to me and quite a feat on Lauri’s part as the insurance fought her tooth and nail. From the beginning they were very difficult but the groundwork Lauri laid out and the avenues she took slowly made them realize how formidable and persistent she is and that she wasn’t going anywhere.  I truly believe that Lauri’s expertise in bike law, experience as a cyclist, determination, hard work, and diligence are what made a difference in my case.  Lauri went above and beyond what I expected and produced an excellent outcome. I can’t thank her enough for all she did and was able to get accomplished. She comes highly recommended by me and if I’m ever in that situation again, which I hope I’m not, Lauri will be my first phone call.

Lorenzo Perez-Febles
Lauri Boxer-Macomber took great care of my situation after a bad bike crash (me vs SUV) earlier this year. Highly recommend if you find yourself in a similar unfortunate situation.

I had never in my life thought that I would need the services of an attorney until that fateful day in September of 2016. It was a very scary thing for me, I was very rattled and confused after my incident. I was out riding my bicycle when I was suddenly and violently hit from behind by a vehicle that was traveling 50-mph.

My body felt battered and broken, and my trust in humanity especially after what I had been through was not the best. But regardless, I felt violated and I knew I needed help from a professional. That help came in the form of Lauri Boxer-Macomber.

Upon meeting her in our home and after a bit of discussion we returned to the scene of my incident and we discussed what had occurred - she was very concerned with the details and nuances. She was also very understanding, compassionate, and concerned with my health and welfare. She insisted I make sure all my bases were covered. I could tell she was very well versed in bicycle law. With that, the public stereotypes of what dealing with an attorney soon faded. She was knowledgeable and incisive in her approach toward my case. Though she also explained to me that it may take quite a while to get things sorted and settled. This is reality, not television fantasy.

That being said, I had no illusions in that area. Sadly, a person who enjoys my sport (cycling) is all too familiar with the direction of what the legal process, public discourse and law enforcement will take when you are an unwilling victim of carelessness.

Please, never ever think that the legal process is easy or expedient, that thought process is nonsense and hearsay. But you can be sure if Lauri is on your side, the job will get done. She will take the time to make sure you are cared for during, as well as after the process of your case.

May you enjoy fair winds and following seas.

Sincerely,
Ivy Luhrs

Working with Lauri and her legal assistants was extremely easy, and I really appreciate the time and the work that they put into my case (bicycle crash).  Their knowledge of bicycle specific law is fantastic, and I had absolutely no problems with their handling of my case. Very professional.  Hope to not have to use again, but certainly would.

My world was collapsing all around me, and then I found Kelly, Remmel and Zimmerman.

In August 2016, I was hit by a truck while biking. Even while I was in the ER, insurance companies started calling and bills were piling up. The emotional and physical pain from the accident alone was too much. The headache of everything else made it nearly unbearable; I needed help.

Lauri Boxer-Macomber took care of everything so that I could focus on healing. She and the team were patient, through, empathetic and responsive. No rock was left unturned.

If you find yourself if need of an attorney, you have the best Maine can offer in Kelly, Remmel and Zimmerman.

I am happy to have had Barry and Heather to work with on a family court matter.  They were a great team and we reached the ending we had hoped for!  I highly recommend them to anyone seeking a partnership that yields results!

Made it clear that contacting the Road Assn would resolve the situation as I was told by an officer of the Assn. Unprofessional

He doesn't miss details and makes certain to communicate in a timely manner. If you need a lawyer call Kelly Remmel & Zimmerman right away!

Everything one would expect from a law office. Everyone here is amazing. With 100% effort, Richard was very thorough and professional. Great communication, kept me up to date with everything going on. Highly recommended. A++

Responsible, respectful and treated me with dignity. The staff was accommodating of all my needs and this establishment is fantastic. Organized. Honest. Down to earth people who will actually listen to what you're saying. Thank you for working with me and my family Rich.

Thank you Rich for all your hard work and understanding! Your due diligence, knowledge and hard work is beyond anything I ever expected from anyone! reviews.ownerResponse: Chris was injured at a business before COVID. During COVID when the courts were closed, the business went out of business. As happens in all injury cases, Chris' doctors had to be paid for their medical services provided to Chris. It is simply beyond the control of a lawyer when a business closes and has no assets and the client owes his doctors for their services. Our entire office was very responsive and accommodating to Chris, sometimes answering his 40 or more emails and texts in a single day. We are sorry Chris' case ended as it did. We too lost in the process.
