reviews.text:
Chris Harmon and Ashley Earl from Garmey Law were absolutely indispensable in assisting me during an extremely challenging time. They made sure I understood everything that was happening with my case from start to finish going way beyond any expectations I had. At times I was anxious and unsure but they were there every step of the way to make sure I was comfortable and guided me through this arduous process with Grace and poise. This led to a very successful outcome that allowed me to close a difficult chapter in my life putting both myself and more importantly my family in a safe and secure position.
I can not thank them enough

Garmey Law is an incredible firm. Ali and Mackenzie are an amazing team! They both are kind, empathetic and listen to everything you need and say. Their care for my case was incredible!
They are very detailed, very communicative, timely, responsive,understanding and want what's best for their clients. I can't thank Ali, Mackenzie and Garmey law enough for making a tough situation easy and comfortable for me and my family ! I can't thank them enough for the hard-work and dedication they used on my case.

We were both retired, living our dream. We were in our 6th year touring the country as fulltime RVers. We were involved in a collision, totalling our truck and seriously injuring Richard so much so that we had to abandon our dream of life on the road forever.
We engaged Garmey Law for their stellar reputation, led by Atty Terry Garmey, recipient of accolades for over 40 years.
Our case faced some hurdles early on. We filed a lawsuit against two parties - the other driver from the Netherlands and hard to track down, and the rental car company who filed a Motion to Dismiss, tied up in the court.
Over time, cases were reassigned and Atty Peter Richard took over our case. Peter called us, introduced himself, listened attentively to our story, and asked meaningful questions. He took command building our case. We were reassured by his firm conviction that we had been wronged. Peter was confident that he could win our case with a substantial settlement.
Peter jump started our case with a high level of commitment. Seeing that our case had stalled, he moved it to another county courthouse.
Peter researched the Rental Car Company's protocol for screening international drivers. When questioning the rental branch, he discovered that a key protocol step was not followed that day, adding credence to their liability.
Peter involved us in developing our case. He asked us for input, such as photos of life on the road and off the road, and our out of pocket expenses as a result of  the accident. It felt good contributing to our case hands on.
Meagan Burnham, paralegal and Peter's assistant, was our very capable and reliable point of contact for questions and concerns. The case settlements came with attached liens which Meagan scrubbed and negotiated reductions with five insurance companys. Her hard work and followup ensured clear final settlement checks to us.
Beatrice Mattison, new as Litigation Case Manager with Garmey Law, joined our case around the time of our depositions and worked closely with Meagan preparing exhibits for trial. She was also excellent backup to Meagan for questions/concerns. Peter did a trial prep exercise with Rick telling his story directly to Beatrice (playing a juror) and she was a compassionate confidence builder for him for which he is very grateful.
Mediation and Deposition were two key milestones in our case where we verbally answered questions by a third party. We needed coaching and Peter mentored us on what to expect, how to answer a question and how to present ourselves favorably.
Around that time, Peter asked Terry to join the team. From this point on, the other parties wanted to negotiate settlements. Together, Peter and Terry gave us sound advice on the monetary risks of not accepting an offer of settlement and opting to go to trial. In the end, we accepted two settlements which in aggregate were incredible - more than we ever expected early on.
I strongly recommend Garmey Law's  Peter Richard to anyone seeking a highly skilled and dedicated attorney who will fight for you to the end and win!
Peter has brought justice, peace of mind and new beginnings to us and I will remain forever indebted and grateful.

Marylou and I were full time RVers for several years - coast to coast, many states, annual visits to friends and family. We were living our dream, when on one day in August our dreams were shattered by a car, barreling through a stop sign at a high rate of speed, struck us, totaled our F350 truck, injuring both Marylou and myself.
After reaching out
Th to the other driver’s insurance company and being denied compensation for a comparable vehicle to our truck, I knew we would need a good lawyer to help us.
After some research, we engaged Garmey Law for their standout resume. We met with Attorney Gary Goldberg and his assistant and told them our story. We were impressed by their compassion for us and their positivity about our case. I knew we had chosen the right firm.
We received a few calls from the firm tightening up details.
Enter, one of their best attorneys, Peter Richard, who took us under his wing, spoke with us on a regular basis, explaining and walking us through the ins and outs of the road to trial, like a close friend.
We had several meetings with Peter and there were a number of offers which he advised us on.
Through the brilliance and negotiating skills of Attorney Richard, he found a second avenue of compensation for the loss of my abilities and our lifestyle.
I cannot say enough about Peter’s assistant and paralegal Meagan Burnham’s support. She was patient and understanding in her approach and worked tirelessly on our case - talking with the Court and keeping us informed.
In the end, Attorney Peter Richard’s tenacity and perseverance in pursuit of a fair judgment for Marylou and myself gave us more than we could imagine in two generous settlements, that have already rekindled our spirits.
I highly recommend Attorney Peter Richard as a fighter and brilliant tactician who will stand with you and be an exemplary advocate as a negotiator and in the court. My eternal gratitude.
Attorney Terry Garmey’s wisdom end experience was invaluable to me personally and the case was strengthened by his presence.
Great team work at Garmey Law, lead by Peter Richard. I wholeheartedly endorse Peter Richard and Garmey Law!
Gary and Jen were awesome and very helpful - highly recommend give them a call!

Kendi Dykema at Garmey provided exceptional legal representation during one of the most difficult times in my life. She represented me in a damages case involving harassment, stalking, and the misuse of my personal information by a healthcare provider. From the very beginning, Kendi acknowledged the extreme emotional toll this situation had taken on me. Her empathy, patience, and thoroughness in preparing me for court made a world of difference.

When unexpected changes arose at the last minute, Kendi went above and beyond to adapt quickly—ensuring I was never left in uncomfortable or unsafe situations, including making sure I didn’t have to wait near the defendant. Her meticulous preparation and calm confidence during questioning allowed me to focus on sharing my story and the impact of the harassment with the Judge.

Kendi’s combination of legal expertise and genuine care for her clients was instrumental in achieving a positive outcome in court. I am deeply grateful for her support and would highly recommend her to anyone in need of a compassionate and highly skilled attorney.

Attorney Andrew and his paralegal Ashley were so incredibly helpful and knowledgeable through the whole process. I was updated step-by-step through everything and educated on what to expect next. My case was treated with care and I felt like a respected, valued client. Andrew Was able to seek exactly what I was asking for with the outcome of the case and I would highly recommend for anybody looking for a dedicated, talented legal team. 10/10

Peter is a solid lawyer and a genuinely good guy. I feel lucky to have ended up in his capable hands. Julie was also super helpful and quick to respond any time I had a question. Peter knows his stuff, and he’s someone you can count on to have your back.

I can't thank Peter Richard and Meagan Burnham enough for the incredible support and dedication they showed during my personal injury case. I was involved in an accident that wasn’t my fault, and from day one, they made sure I understood my rights and walked me through every step of the process.
They handled everything with professionalism and care — communicating clearly, fighting hard for my best interests, and ultimately helping me secure a fair settlement. What could have been a stressful and overwhelming experience was made so much easier thanks to their expertise and guidance

I highly recommend Peter Richard at Garmey Law.  Information provided was clear and expections were exceeded.  Attorney Richard was forthright and a pleasure to work with.  Paralegal Meagan was quick to follow up when I had questions or concerns and she too was a pleasure to work with.

Truly can’t thank them enough. When I was injured in a car accident I had no idea how much my life was going to change. It was a very difficult journey however Peter and Meagan provided not only care and support but reassurance that I had not received before. They won my case in half the time I expected and provided me with everything I needed with clear communication, instructions, and information about every step. They are wonderful people and completely genuine. Thank you!!!!

I worked with Chris Harmon and his team for around 5 years on a case that was very personal to me. Chris and Kendi never gave up on me and supported me emotionally and financially by taking my case pro bono. I cannot thank this team enough. I was so nervous but they made me feel supported and comfortable with every decision.
Absolutely amazing people, I am so thankful for them . I will recommend them to anyone who needs a great lawyer.so friendly and very responsive.

When life throws you the kind of curve you never thought possible, it can cause the highest level of anxiety and feeling of defeat; not to mention the physical pain and important things you miss.
After my first phone conference with Gary and Jennifer, I knew I had the best legal team on my side.  They put my mind at ease assuring me that the most important thing was for me to get the medical care I needed and they would take care of the rest.
I am here to tell you they meant every word!  I never had a worry and when I had questions, Jennifer and MacKenzie immediately put my mind at ease, making sure i had the answers I needed every time.  I honestly don’t know what I would have done without them.
This legal team helped me through one of the hardest things I’ve ever gone through and I am forever thankful.
Garmey Law represented me in a recent personal injury case I had, and I have to say, they did outstanding work. Good communication and clear expectations. I recommend them highly.

I can not be happier with Garmey Law. I was unsure of my rights as a disabled person. When I had my low impact accident that caused severe exacerbation of my disability and some new injuries that are still bothersome. They assured me that I did have a case and the accident was 100% not my fault. They got me a substantial settlement. I hope this causes the company to hire and train truck drivers about where and how to back up safely. I will have to continue to care for my injuries  unfortunately, But I am So Thankful to my team at Garmey Law Kristrine, (who got the ball rolling), then Ashley,  Gary, and Andy, who took the case home fighting. You guys are awesome. Loved your energy! 🎉

After my vehicle accident I did not get a lawyer thinking the other drivers insurance would treat me failry, that did not happen.  Working with Peter was a great experience.  He is confident, encouraging and puts in the effort needed to get the best results.  I was very happy with how I was treated, Meagan was great with communication and I was very pleased with the final outcome.  I should have reached out to Garmey Law from the start.

I suffered permanent injuries from a fall that almost killed me,and 6 months later lost my husband of 25 years. I was to say the least really struggling with my physical injuries,and the grief of losing my husband unexpectedly. Peter Richards and David Kreisler were my voice.I was going through so much. Not only where they caring,and professional They always kept me updated.They successfully help me get a settlement for my case.. I 'm very grateful to them and their caring staff.

After so many years of constant back and forth, we came into this office at a point of giving up, thank God we didn't. Carl was up front, honest, explained to us what the process would be from that point on. Both of us have had a weight from the struggle lifted.
Thank you to everyone who worked with us!
Very kind and informative, helped my grandmother with drafting her will and at a very reasonable price. I definitely reccomend their services

I had excellent service with this law practice.They worked very hard to achieve the end results of my long medical case.Im extremely satisfied with what was done.A very hard working office .All staff was cooperative and efficient esp Mr. McCue who never gave up working this case and his paralegal Guillia.I highly recommend this practice to anyone..Everyone was polite and explained clearly what was happening through the whole process.

I am grateful for the team at McCue Law Office. They were responsive, organized, and honest about what to expect at every step. The process felt manageable because they communicated so well. I felt heard and supported the entire time. Thank you very much.

reviews.text:
My wife and I recently closed on an off-market home, and we couldn’t have done it without the expertise and guidance of Jerome, Jill, and their team. From day one, they were responsive, thorough, and incredibly knowledgeable about the nuances of real estate law — especially for a non-traditional transaction like ours as first time home buyers.

They made sure every document was reviewed with care, protected our interests throughout the negotiation process, and explained each step in a way that made us feel confident and informed. Thanks to their diligence, we were able to close smoothly and on schedule.

We’re so grateful to have had Jerome and Jill on our team and would highly recommend them to anyone navigating the home-buying process — truly top-notch service.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're thrilled to hear you had a great experience! Thank you for the feedback.

reviews.text: My father used A,T&R for a will that included a 4- year trust. The will was poorly written. It would have been fine if all the siblings were reasonable, however two siblings decided to abuse their position and try to take more than they deserve. The will offered no protection against abuse. The trustee needed to be replaced and I was stuck with the position or lose my inheritance and my other sibling lose hers as well. Due to bad language in the will I was forced to do the work with zero compensation for my time while dealing with underhanded attacks to my personal and business life as well as close to 18K in legal expenses. AI wasn't available in 2017 when the will was written but I tried it out recently and after giving it minimal information (one short paragraph pretending I was my father in 2017) I was warned about everything that happened and given great advice on how to write a will that would have prevented all the problems I ran into. This would likely have kept our permanently fractured family together. A,T&R was the legal team my father chose and with all the mess and confusion at the time I felt it was best to stick with them. I thought it would be easier. HOWEVER after giving them many thousands over 4 years and the light at the end of the tunnel was in view.... we just needed to write one letter to wrap this trust up and get it behind me... they decide to just stop responding to me! 3 months went by while I was patiently waiting for them to get around to it. I would try to contact them again about every 2-3 weeks wondering what the hold up was. It was getting close to tax time and when I contacted the accountant asking why the pre-paid tax forms weren't done yet I was told that he was still waiting for his questions to A,T&R to be answered! I told them A,T&R is no longer representing us.  The next day I get an email from A,T&R "I understand that you have hired new legal counsel to wrap matters up." That's all I get after 3+ months of waiting. Now I had to go find someone else and get them up to speed just to write a trust closing letter.  No idea why they did this. I was always patient and polite. I had hoped they learned a lesson from this poorly written will that created so much pain and frustration but I never once complained. There is just no excuse. More than anything my father wanted our family to stick together after he passed and trusting A,T&R was one of the biggest mistakes of his life.

Professional, efficient and responsive. Jerome and the team have been excellent to deal with every step of the way. We've used them twice and have suggested them to others many times. Great experience overall.

reviews.text: Attorney Travis Brennan represented me in my personal injury lawsuit resulting from a motor vehicle accident in which I suffered a severe brain injury. He is tremendous and I am 100% pleased with the legal services he and his team provided. Travis is a superbly skilled trial attorney and such a kind and compassionate person. I was consulted on decisions with choices clearly explained to me; I never felt pressured, but rather, well informed and heard.  I was most pleased with the outcome of my case and am extremely grateful for the fine legal services, care and respect I received from attorney Brennan and his team.

reviews.text:
I never imagined I would need legal representation, but no one expects life’s worst events. I was referred to Berman & Simmons and had the great fortune of being represented by Attorney Kristin T. Murray-James, along with the paralegal team of Tiffany S. Mullins and Alana E Mallar.

Our case presented many challenges, but Attorney Murray-James and the paralegal team consistently demonstrated empathy, professionalism, and unwavering support. Attorney Murray-James and her team were sensitive to our fears and concerns, and I felt completely confident placing my trust in their capable hands. With compassion and expertise, they guided us through a complex process and helped us reach a positive outcome.

Attorney Murray-James takes a truly human-centered approach to her work. She never loses sight of what her clients are going through while maintaining the strength and determination necessary to advocate effectively. Attorney Murray-James’s holistic, thoughtful care made a lasting impact—not only did she navigate difficult legal matters with skill, but she also helped us find the strength to move forward.

In one of the darkest chapters of our lives, they were our light—fierce advocates, compassionate listeners, and unwavering allies.

I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Murray-James and her outstanding paralegal team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
JP,

Thank you for your incredibly sweet and heartfelt feedback regarding attorney Kristin Murray-James and her team. Your kind words mean so much to us and really highlight what we strive for: a human-centered approach to our work and fierce advocacy for our clients.

It truly is our privilege to be able to help our clients get their lives back on track after serious personal injury. We’re so glad we were able to help you.

reviews.text: This was my first time needing a lawyer, and I was nervous because I wasn’t sure if my situation even justified legal help. However, Chris took the time to explain everything clearly, including all possible outcomes, which really put my mind at ease. He kept me informed throughout the entire process and worked diligently on my behalf. I was very satisfied with his professionalism, service, and the outcome.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Thank you for this note and kind words about Attorney Chris Boots. Despite your situation, we’re glad you had a positive experience with us.

We appreciate you taking time to leave this 5-star review. We're glad you had a positive experience with us!

reviews.text: I’m going to cut to the chase here and give 5 stars to Berman and Simmons! My experience with this law firm has been exceptional from day one of meeting with Attorney Michael Bigos to the final settlements. I’m a survivor of some serious trauma and was initially nervous about calling a law firm. However, I learned that Attorney Bigos has aquired specialized training to understand the effects of trauma on individuals, and how to recognize signs of trauma in order to create a safe and supportive environment to best represent his clients. Attorney Bigos understands that trauma can significantly impact a person’s communication, behavior, and ability to navigate the legal system. I had no worries with Attorney Bigos on my side, because it wasn’t just him caring about my case… I had a team at this law firm! When you first call Berman and Simmons there will be an intake from a Paralegal that will listen to your situation. I spoke with Erika Lindstrom (Paralegal for Attorney Bigos) who provided a very calming environment and clear communication, which made me feel comfortable and safe. Most importantly, I felt believed, and was provided with support groups (as well as other resources) to help me heal. I didn’t expect that, and was very pleased with all the extra that Berman and Simmons provided to me. They totally went above and beyond. Moreover, Attorney Joseph Gousse was close by to assist. A trauma-trained lawyer as well, Joseph was present for meetings to help; and, from the first moment we met, his personal aura radiated as truly genuine. I highly recommend Berman and Simmons for any personal injury case that has caused you trauma. I feel like a giant weight has been lifted off my shoulders. Thank you, Berman and Simmons!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Leigh,

We appreciate you getting straight to the point and providing this incredibly thoughtful review about Attorneys Mike Bigos and Joe Gousse, and their team! The trauma-informed training our attorneys and staff has received sets us apart from other law firms and allowed us to provide a comfortable, safe and calming environment for your healing and recovery. Beyond the injury, we look at the whole person to make sure we’re supporting all their needs. We’re so happy that giant weight was lifted off your shoulders and you had such a positive experience with us.

Thank you for sharing your feedback and making sure others know about the services.

I was referred to this office from another lawyer who was unable to assist me due his caseload. I sent a very detailed email to this law firm explaining my health issues and requested a phone consultation to see if they could assist me in my SSI denial claim. SSI claims are commonly denied on the first submittal and I was told a good Attorney could help me. After the receptionist revealed she had not read my email, I sent yet another, from the VA Hospital, where I was that day to reiterate my case and warned her that the previous Attorney I spoke to was unfamiliar with SGA income allowance for SSI recipients ($1180 for 2018). After we arranged our phone call today not only did the receptionist want to let me know my information was incorrect she put me on the phone with "the money person," who also told me I was in error. I read verbatim from the Social Security website and still I was not believed. Finally, "Carol," comes to the phone -- doesn't even introduce herself or even bother to ask a question, she simply stated, "Ok, you are not our client." Imagine that? "You are not our client." I couldn't believe how rude, unprofessional and disrespectful she was and I decided to just end the call. There wasn't a word about how each of her two employees didn't even know Social Security income requirements and yet they are the one's informing the public they are experts in Social Security claims.  Although I have no way of confirming this I would think what I experienced was a lack of interest in my case because frankly there just isn't enough money to make from this case for this to be worthwhile -- and if so, that is completely understandable and within the rights of this office to pass on representing me. For anyone else reading this consider that you are in a dire situation and need help. Whatever physical or mental issues you might be experiencing, you need someone that will listen to you and truly want to help you. This office is in the wrong line of work in my opinion and should consider another practice. If you don't even know the SSI SGA income benefits, and are telling people they don't qualify, you are doing a huge disservice for others that may listen to you and walk away feeling their case is hopeless.

reviews.text: Chad is the best of the best. The whole team exceeded my expectations.

It also appears most of the reviews for this law firm are fake. Buyer beware.

Edit: I’m adding that since Chad was removed from my case it was successfully processed by the MHRC and is currently in settlement. I feel had I continued to retain Chad as my attorney he would have jeopardized the entire case

Do not hire this man. All of his 5 star reviews are fake.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We are unable to address the specifics of this former client’s case due to our professional obligations under the Maine Bar Rules. However, we can address the comments made about Attorney Chad Hansen’s qualifications, reputation, and results.

Attorney Chad Hansen is widely recognized as one of the top employment lawyers in Maine and has built a respected national reputation over more than twenty years of practice. His work has earned the trust of federal and state judges, respected members of the Maine bar, investigators and commissioners at the Maine Human Rights Commission, and leaders at Disability Rights Maine, where he served as both a Member and President of the Board of Directors.

Chad holds an AV-Preeminent rating from Martindale-Hubbell — the organization’s highest possible ranking for legal ability and ethical standards. This rating is based entirely on confidential evaluations from judges and peer attorneys. He is also listed in U.S. News – Best Lawyers in America® in the category of Employment Law (Individuals), an honor awarded only to the top practitioners in the field.

Chad has a long record of successful jury trials, favorable Human Rights Commission decisions, and major victories in state and federal court, including:

$867,000 federal jury verdict in a disability accommodation case (2021)

$360,000+ jury verdict in an age discrimination case against Market Basket (2024)

Numerous published decisions in which courts denied employers’ motions to dismiss or for summary judgment, allowing employees’ claims to proceed

These cases — many of which have been cited nationally — are only a sampling of his work. Prospective clients are welcome to search any of the reported decisions listed here https://www.maineemployeerights.com/lawyers/chad-hansen/ or ask us for references from past clients.

Chad’s track record, professionalism, and dedication have made him one of the most respected employee-rights attorneys in Maine and throughout New England. While we cannot comment on confidential aspects of any representation, we can confidently say that this reviewer’s opinion does not reflect Chad’s standing in the legal community or the experience of the hundreds of clients he has successfully represented.

If you are seeking experienced, ethical, and highly effective representation in an employment law matter, our team would be glad to speak with you.

To Whom It May Concern,

It is with great sincerity and deep appreciation that I write this letter of recommendation for Matthew Merritt, Esq. My husband and I had the privilege of working with Matthew during one of the most challenging and uncertain times in our lives, and his dedication, compassion, and expertise made all the difference.

After nearly 39 years of loyal, unwavering service to UPS, my husband was faced with a work-related disability that left us not only navigating a difficult medical situation but also grappling with the abrupt end of his workman’s compensation benefits. It felt deeply unfair and overwhelming — as though decades of hard work and commitment could be so easily overlooked. In the midst of this uncertainty, Matthew Merritt stepped in as our advocate.

From our very first meeting, Matthew approached our case with kindness, honesty, and a clear sense of purpose. He treated us like people, not just a file number. His expertise in workman’s compensation law was immediately evident, and he worked diligently to secure continued financial support during my husband’s time away from work, ensuring some stability when we needed it most.

But what truly sets Matthew apart is how he goes above and beyond expectations. Not only did he help us secure those much-needed benefits, but he also advocated for a settlement we hadn’t even considered or expected. I’ll never forget the look of relief on my husband’s face when Matthew shared the good news. That moment of peace and reassurance was priceless, and it was made possible by Matthew’s dedication and tenacity.

Matthew Merritt is a remarkable attorney and an even better human being. He combines sharp legal skills with genuine compassion and integrity. I wholeheartedly recommend him to anyone seeking legal representation, especially in matters of workman’s compensation or disability-related claims. He will fight for you, treat you with dignity, and deliver results that truly matter.

If you have the opportunity to work with Matthew Merritt, know that you are in excellent hands.

With deepest gratitude,

Lena Knight,
Wife, Secretary, House Keeper, Bookkeeper, Chef, Health Consultant and Humorist for
Armando Ventura

I was receiving worker's compensation for a work related injury.  I had to fight with the insurance company to receive my benefits timely and to get medical bills and prescriptions covered.  As most people know workers compensation is a fraction of what you were making when you were working.  Living on this reduced amount was difficult enough but any interruption in my benefits would have been devastating to my family financially.

I contacted several attorneys but none would take my case because the insurance company had accepted liability.  A friend referred me to Ben.  Ben and his paralegal Heather made things significantly less stressful.  They were on top of my weekly benefits and in the event I didn't receive them timely they would handle it immediately.  I no longer had to fight to just go to the doctor or get a prescription refilled.  If I did have a question they would respond the same day.  They were also able to get me voc rehab so that I could get assistance finding a job that I could manage with my injury.

The insurance company sent me to multiple functional capacity exams and independent medical exams.  I am confident that had I not had fantastic representation my benefits would have been stopped.  At that point another attorney may have been willing to take on my case however I would have gone without weekly benefits while it was being fought.

Going through the workers compensation process is brutally stressful on top of having to deal with your injury.  I cannot imagine how much worse things would have been without having Ben and Heather.  Finally, after 5 years of dealing with everything Ben was able to get me a fair settlement.
I highly recommend Ben Grant. Himself and Heather were there through it all with me. Always responsive to any of my questions. They kept me up to date on anything new.

Doug Kaplan is an extremely fine lawyer and friend. For those in need of legal consultation for personal injury or victimization, Mr. Kaplan and Mr. Grant are among the most respected and qualified in State of Maine. Paralegal staff are also top shelf. Peace.

ON MY SIDE-  After being injured at work and my injuries left me unable to perform work functions and limited my driving capability, I sought out legal counsel. This lead me to the offices of Kaplan & Grant. Ben Grant and his team have many years of experience. When faced with a serious challenge in your life you want someone on your side. Ben and his team were there every step of the way. For three years they fought for me. They helped me through difficult times of emotional, mental and physical setbacks. His staff, especially Ben’s Paralegal Heather Gosch, was always there to help me along the way. Ben’s legal expertise helped navigate through a very difficult process. If you need an SSDI or Workman's comp lawyer, and someone on your side, he is your guy! He fights for you! Thanks Ben!

I would recommend Ben Grant to anyone who needed a very good Worker's Compensation attorney. Ben is a very caring and knowledgeable attorney. He and Heather are also very nice people to work with. They always call back in a timely manner and have the answers you need. No question is silly to them. He honestly is working for your best interest. Thank you Ben and Heather for all you have done for me.

Mr. Grant and his team work for their client as a priority making them feel important and listened to during a difficult time of mental, emotional, and physical setbacks.

Ben was calm and direct and very thorough, and he put me at ease as soon as I walked in his office.  Heather is not only easy to work with, she's efficient, prompt, and knowledgeable.  I never had to wait for a response or an explanation to any of my questions.  Besides her excellent work ethic, she was honest and direct but with compassion.  They took a huge weight off my shoulders, and I greatly appreciate the attention they gave to me and my case.  I couldn't have asked for better representation!   Thank you!!

15 year's ago, I looked in the Yellow Pages (yes the actual Yellow Pages book) as so many pre-internet folk did in the year 2010. Now, that saying wouldn't really hold water today, but back then...well, here I am 15 years later, writing a review for a guy who I haven't seen, in just as long.
Attorney, John Elmore is hands down, one of the most professional, moral, transparent, knowledgeable attorneys I have ever met, and from the moment you meet him, you will feel relief in whatever case brought you to him in the first place. His ability to lay the facts out for you in a simple way, leaves you truly feeling like FINALLY someone has your back. I could honestly keep going on about him personally, but the bottom line, he is FAIR, he is EFFICIENT and he fights like hell for his clients because he truly understands what is at stake...if you're looking for this type of attorney, than you're dealing with a situation that is life altering at very least, if not completely life changing.
John Elmore is going to fight for you, not like it's his job, but like it's your life... and when you meet him, you'll instantly know he cares about yours.
Good luck to all seeking this sort of help. It can be a nightmare but you found the right man.

Karma is real..I walked into this office for help with my disability case from getting hurt from work. This was not work comp I was getting care paid for by my own health insurance. He was very concerned because I was having neck pain that made typing almost impossible. My hands would shake with pain shooting up my spine. I walked into this law office, gave Mr. Zumbado my situation & concerns. I was basically laughed out of his office! Quote..I am not getting involved in this situation, no way, good luck! I felt embarrassed and thankfully I didn't give up. I have worked 2 jobs since I was 15 years old. I was 50 years old when this happened. Within weeks I have a wonderful lawyer out of mass, who fought for my case. I am now on disability, getting the medical care that's needed & able to keep a roof over my head! The lawyer took $300. reviews.text:
My husband and I are seniors. We married recently and have been negotiating the challenges of keeping  both families happy. Every time we discussed rewriting our wills it created a whole lot of stress. Some recent developments made it imperative.
I found Caitlin through a web search and called for an appointment to discuss our plans. We agreed that if we didn't like her or the atmosphere or felt we were being pressured to do something we didn't feel comfortable about we would say thank you and leave.
Caitlin was a breath of fresh air.  She asked lots of questions, took notes, and never rushed us through the process. She discussed the pros and cons of trusts and helped us come to a decision about one.  We both felt comfortable sharing our wishes, concerns, expectations and fears about our decisions.
Caitlin's understanding of our unique situations and her respect for us and our decisions was such a relief. Our biggest concern is the care of our autistic grandson who is under our guardianship. My husband has children to consider. I have a niece and nephew who have been more like a younger brother and sister.
Our wills have been written, signed and notarized. From the day we all met to the signing took two weeks. At any time, if we wished to make changes, all we had to do was call Luann, Caitlin's assistant and Notary.
It is such a relief to have written wills that provided for our loved ones while protecting us should we lose each other. Caitlin's fees were more than fair especially compared to some Portland attorneys.
We unconditionally recommend using Caitlin's services.
Mary Sullivan and Clint Wyman

Corey followed his case, kept in touch with me and my son throughout his three-month incarceration and six-month rehab.  My son graduated from rehab after six months, a changed person.  I am grateful for Corey’s professionalism, hard work, follow-up with us and his sincere caring for his clients. I feel like he had a part in saving his life.

Through unfortunate events, I had the opportunity to work with Corey on some very pressing matters with my freedom on the line. If anyone is actually reading this and wanting to know information that will help you make a decision choosing representation, I can only share this-

He cares. I don’t have years and years of experience needing an attorney. While seeking representation, I immediately felt he had my back and showed me empathy. Within the limits of the law and also what’s right vs wrong, Corey consistently treated me with dignity and respect while also giving me the facts without fluffing things up or pushing me in a direction that would further his career. There are self-absorbed people that walk this earth just like there are self-absorbed attorneys that play “the game” as I would call it. Let’s face it, it’s all about money and control in the court system.

I gave Corey five stars because he earned it. Whether you’re facing a slap on the wrist or severe consequences, I can assure you that using Corey and his firm, you will be just as fortunate as I was.

In September of 2020 I was involved in a motorcycle accident, a driver “didn’t see me” and ended up totaling my bike. I contacted Cory and he was all over it. He is very much down to earth and listens to his clients. I would highly recommend him to anyone! Thank you Cory!!
Cory is extremely professional. He has given me piece of mind facing serious charges. Highly recommended.

Cory is an excellent lawyer. When I first needed his services I was able to get in touch with him on a Sunday evening. From there he handled everything for me. And with the situation I was in he got me a great outcome especially with COVID-19 making things a lot more difficult. He was always there for me when I needed him and always took time to handle things and also explain everything to me. He is not only a excellent lawyer but he is also a great person. He makes you feel welcome like you’ve known him your whole life. I would recommend Cory to my friends and family without question.

I reached out to Cory over a year ago, after I got into my first situation with any offenses. He made me feel comfortable and confident heading into the situation, while maintaining a down to earth yet professional atmosphere which put me at such ease. I highly recommend him. He was attentive with any email or phone call that I needed answered with my questions. An amazing lawyer and I’m grateful I chose him.

December 24th 2018 I was initiated into the horrors of being ran into and having  my car totaled after only three days of ownership, and dealing with the greed and disinterest of the insurance companies,both mine and theirs. I was referred to Rachel Deschuytner  and am thankful for that twist of fate. She guided me through the house of mirrors and pain that was caused by theirs and  my own insurance company and explained every step and what to expect. She listened when my temper was lost and guided me back to sanity and reality during these last two years. Her professionalism is refreshing after dealing with the sharks of the past , and should the need ever arise (God forbid) I would not hesitate to call her. If you need an injury lawyer , She is your "Man for the Job"!!!

On June 2, 2019 I was riding my bicycle in preparation for the upcoming Trek Across Maine ride. While riding through an intersection I was struck by a pick up truck.  I sustained a number of injuries, and my expensive road bike was totaled.

In an attempt to settle the claim myself, I quickly discovered that trying to deal with insurance companies was not a job for the faint of heart. Nor was it a specialty of mine.

My daughter recommended that I contact Rachel Deschuytner.  This may be the best advice she ever gave me.  I found Rachel to be professional, knowledgeable and very understanding. She conducted a thorough interview with me gathering all of the information that I had, and went to work.

As the complexities of the claim proceeded, she kept me informed every step of the way. She was also very available for me to be in touch with if any concerns arose. At the end of the day, I was more than pleased with the settlement that she secured for me. I would highly recommend Rachel and her firm for anyone looking for a personal injury attorney.

Rachel Deschuytner was efficient, professional and very effective for settling my case with a better than expected outcome. I am very appreciative of her help after I suffered a difficult injury.  She was always so responsive and empathetic.

I was hit by a car Last November while crossing the street, in a Crosswalk. Eitan from Brown and Goldberg is who I chose to represent me. He was very fair, speedy, and vigilant all the things that definitely matter in personal injury cases. Eitan went above and beyond and ultimately got me more compensation than we had discussed and I had expected. I highly recommend this firm for anyone who is looking for a trustworthy attorney or law practice.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you James.  We were glad to help you in that difficult time.

reviews.text: My experience was truly great. He handled my case with genuine care and professionalism from start to finish. What stood out the most was how communicative he was—he kept in touch the entire time and made sure I was always informed. I really appreciated how the whole experience was centered around me and my needs. I felt heard, supported, and well taken care of throughout the entire process. Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Leandro.  You asked great questions and we appreciated working with you

reviews.text:
Eric is the best, he goes above and beyond for everyone.
I highly recommend Atty Eric Brown
They do a phenomenal job, answers all questions and they're always great at communication.
Have used several times
Eitan was wonderful! He did everything he could for my case and I couldn’t have asked for a better attorney. I highly recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jennifer.  We were glad to be able to help

reviews.text: This law firm is the definition of ambulance chasers. We received a solicitation from them because they discovered my son was in an accident by trolling police reports. As a lawyer myself I find this reprehensible. Don't ever hire a lawyer from a solicitation; get a recommendation from a trusted source. If I could give zero stars I would.

Can’t give a 0 star or I would have. It is absolutely criminal that an organization would pull police reports to find accidents and individuals to exploit. This is absolutely a horrible practice and I would be embarrassed to have a company like this to represent me. Also sending spam mail to my home results in more trash.
Great office nice people. They get the job done !!

Scammer. Do not call or interact with in any way. They'll charge your phone and spam your phone with more calls about bs auto accidents that never happened. Sure buddy I had 3 accidents over ma in a single day and you just happen to represent all 3? Gtfoh!
Eric was great!
Great guy. Great legal services. Highly recommended!
Excellent legal services
My experience with Mr. Pileggi has been wonderful. He was professional, knowledgeable, and took the time to clearly explain everything. Highly recommended!
Fantastic: empathetic, understanding, effective, experienced. Highly recommend Dan Pileggi. Meet him and you will see.

Called a few times before reaching anyone. When I did, I explained the general nature of my case to the admin assistant. Received a call back later and she said the attorney would not speak with me and I should find someone else. My case was clearly listed among their areas of practice. There was absolutely no explanation what the issue was and she did not offer any references on who else to call. It seems totally unprofessional and frankly rude to turn some one in need of legal representation away with no context.

We had our property deeds and wills for  our estate completed here 4 years ago.  My husband just passed away, and my personal representative called to ask a simple question regarding the language in one sentence.  No one would speak to us on the phone and I was told they no longer do "wills and estates".  Really?  Their website says they do.  Either way, this is their work, and I didn't appreciate being told to call a different firm.  Unsatisfied with the lack of professionalism on the phone, we thought perhaps it was a misunderstanding, so my rep went to the office.  Nope, can't help answer a simple question... and not even a "sorry for your loss."
If you want an attorney to back up his/her work, you may want to go elsewhere.  I have not had this experience with any law practice.  So shocking.  Hope the managing partner is aware of how poorly we were treated.

This law office prepared paperwork in 2015 for a sale of property we owned with a balloon payment in five years.

There are questions about the documents as the time is fast-approaching for the final balloon payment, but the original attorney who prepared the legal papers retired.

We could get no one in their office to answer a five minute question clarifying language.

A lawyer in Tucson, where we live, stated in his opinion, the legal language was vague and that we needed to get answers from the law office that prepared the documents.

Acadia Law Group refused to answer a simple question re: language and referred us to another firm in Bangor.

Acadia Law Group and Attorney Alison King have handled a variety of real estate closings, corporations and contract matters for us.  Ms. King has always provided very competent and personable service.  The entire staff is very responsive if you have any questions regarding your legal matter or case.
I highly recommend Acadia Law Group.

If you're looking for legal advice or have procedural questions this may be the place for you.  But if have a contentious situation and you're looking for someone to fight tooth and nail for you. . .look elsewhere.
My favorite law firm!
They do good work, very professional... will do a longer review at another time.
Acadia Law Group has represented my businesses for years and have done so with excellence. They take time to answer questions and are not only smart but very personable. I highly recommend them!
I called to ask for help . . They were not interested
Warm environment

The worst. They don’t know what they’re doing and insert their own opinions instead of respecting and implementing their clients’ wishes. Horrible communication. Most unprofessional. Avoid at all costs.
Unethical
I'm a lawyer at the different firm, and I recommend this law firm for the types of cases I don't do. Andrew and Joe are great to work with and do a great job by their clients.

It would be zero stars for me if I actually had the choice to post that. Cheryl at the front desk was extremely unprofessional, rude, and even hung up on me when I started to get disgruntled about them handling my probate case. They don't know what they are doing, dont request the right documents and blame other people for their mistakes when in fact they know nothing about what they are doing. They held up my deal since October of 22 and now in a position when I am closing on land in 3 weeks and had to get a new lawyer. Totally, the worst law firm I've ever dealt with and if you want things to get done and in a professional and timely matter then stay away from this law firm. It's unbelievable.

Seems like their working for someone elses behalf rather than what's best for my interest. Take a long time to get back to you when you're told you'd be called by next week, it's been three weeks and no call.
Person I spoke to was extremely unprofessional, “know it all attitude” and hung up the phone. Wouldn’t recommended this firm,

Went to this firm due to the overwhelmingly positive reviews. Unfortunately the experience was very similar to what Tony Glidden describes in his review. Nothing during our visit would meet the bar of professionalism or basic competence of conducting business. Arrive to the meeting ten minutes early, no one in the office, wait for our meeting time, ring the bell, no one responds, ten minutes later have to call them from inside their building to tell them we're waiting. Andrew Dawson comes down looking like he just woke up from a nap. Doesn't know who we are or why we're there (not a walk-in, we had an appointment). In a 15 minute meeting, 10 of our questions were met with "I don't know" as a final answer. His personal conduct suggested he aggressively didn't want us there.

Steve O'Donnell was my attorney for my SSI case and not only did we get a fully favorable decision BUT he got the judge to open up an older application that was denied to go back 3 years more for retroactive benefits. Steve is a great attorney! HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!
Competent and caring lawyers with years of experience dealing with wills and trusts

Dont use this firm andrew dawson was appointed to be my lawyer and  acted like he was too busy to handle my  case. So unprofessional, i offered to pay him money so he would put in a little effort and he said i think i should just withdraw. There you go buddy you got what you asked for a lighter load.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the support!!!

reviews.text:
Richard is truly the kind of attorney you hope to have in your corner when navigating something as personal and high-stakes as a custody case. He is thoughtful, strategic, and deeply committed to the well-being of the families he represents. Throughout this journey to establish parental rights for my daughter, he consistently demonstrated professionalism, compassion, and an unwavering dedication to doing what was right for our situation. During the court process I was diagnosed with cancer and underwent treatment. Richard and his team went out of their way to check in on me and my daughter every step of the way. I can’t even tell you how much that kindness meant.
I also want to give a heartfelt thank you to Erin. From the moment we connected, her kindness and compassion stood out. During such an emotionally heavy process, she was patient, supportive, and always made me feel heard and cared for. The way she approaches her work—with both professionalism and genuine empathy—made an incredibly difficult chapter of my life feel far less overwhelming.
Navigating the court system while protecting your child’s future is one of the most stressful experiences a parent can go through. Having a team that truly cares makes all the difference. Richard and Erin provided not only legal expertise but also humanity and support when it mattered most.
I am deeply grateful for everything they did for my daughter and me, and I would wholeheartedly recommend this firm to anyone who needs a legal team that combines skill, integrity, and genuine compassion.
reviews.ownerResponse: We really appreciate your taking the time to post this, and your kind words. It is really gratifying for all of us to help clients who need and benefit from our actions. And I agree - our team is amazing!

reviews.text:
Maryellen has been amazingly helpful to my brother and I in trying to navigate confusing and urgent legal matters for my aging mom. We suddenly needed to get power of attorney done and Maryellen was able to give us an appointment on very short notice. We went from knowing we needed to get this document done but totally clueless as to how to make that happen to it was done and notarized within four days.

I am extremely impressed with how kind and helpful Maryellen is at such a difficult time for our family.

Fast forward almost two years and Maryellen is STILL helping out. We have a few final details to iron out and Maryellen responded to my questions as quickly as if I was a highly lucrative client.

If you have any legal needs, Maryellen will help you out.
reviews.ownerResponse: Joanna, thank you so much for taking the time to leave this review.  I’m really happy that we were able to respond quickly to your needs.  Maryellen is the best!
Thank you for your review!

reviews.text: Recommend looking elsewhere. Having never gone through a legal action before it was difficult knowing when the process was going off the rails until my final judgement and the amount of time and money spent to get there with Port City Legal. Joe is very reassuring at initial meetings, but a very inexperienced lawyer took my case afterward and the case dragged out a year with an unfavorable result for me. To pursue further action would have cost me even more time and money that I had already lost. Do your research and demand progress dates be met. Do not assume you will be seen as a priority or that a highly experienced  lawyer in the firm will be handling the bulk of your case.
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm puzzled by this review. I have spoken to all of our attorneys and none are aware of a dissatisfied client. We also searched for clients from Windham and found none who had any issues with our work. It is not our practice to reassign clients to a different attorney once they hire us - in fact, our client engagement agreement specifies which attorney a client with work with. Our firm did experience the tragic and sudden death of Joe Lewis this January, so we then had to reassign his clients to other attorneys, but reassignments were collaborative and with full knowledge and consent of our clients. Please feel free to reach out to us directly if you want to follow up with this issue, but I don't think it's an accurate assessment of Port City Legal, where we make clients a priority every day.

reviews.text: Friendly and competent representation from this group.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your support.

reviews.text:
I can't say enough good things about Port City Legal. They did an outstanding job for me.   Joe's passing was such a shock. His professionalism, and kindness to both parties during a very hostile situation, showed so much class. I truly admired him.

Erin , went above and beyond.  She was not just a paralegal, she was a friend.  The  emotional support, she provide, kept me sane, and grounded.  Her well spoken words, kept me focused, positive, and confident throughout such a troubling time.   She is a real asset to the team.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review and kind thoughts. Erin is a treasure, and we're so glad to hear of her help to you.

reviews.text: I am a Connecticut resident; my wonderful Port City Legal attorney -- working with me over 2+ years via phone and email from up there in Maine on probate matters and rental real estate questions mainly -- is a knowledgeable, kind and eminently patient professional (believe me, I've *amply* tested the latter!): Maryellen Sullivan. I want to take this opportunity to highly recommend attorney Sullivan -- thus also PCL, for its lucky association with her!   :-)    If you need an attorney who is very responsive and easy to communicate with,  who will do right by you whatever your situation, and refer you to someone else good should you have a particularly specialized issue that is somehow not within her realm of expertise -- please give Maryellen a try. I know that I, for one, am glad that I found her! (Thanks so much as always, Maryellen! -- and my thanks to Port City Legal, too; as a law firm you are to be commended for simply having had the good sense to bring somebody like her under your shingle!)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your kind words. Your experience with Maryellen is the goal of all of our team here and why we do what we do.
Thanks, Lemuel. It's been a pleasure working with you.
Thanks, Tanner. We think you're 5 stars too.

reviews.text: Victoria and Taylor are the best duo I have had the honor of experiencing over the past two years. On the days I was not my best, they were always at their best. When things were the absolute worst that they could be, these two proved to be stronger and better than anything the opposition could throw my way. I am forever grateful for these two and my child is safe and taken care of because of these ladies. I recommend these ladies to anyone needing family legal services in Maine. They truly care about you and the best outcome that can be achieved for you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Clarence: this is music to our ears.  We try our very best to always keep our clients (and the kids!) front and center in everything we do.  Thank you for taking the time to recognize Victoria and Taylor as the stars they are!

reviews.text: I highly recommend Port City Legal for anyone needing assistance with a probate court issue.  My attorney, Maryellen Sullivan, did a great job.  She is very knowledgeable and professional.  She was able to take care of my case with a favorable result which my family is very grateful for.  Terri Stevens is her legal assistant and also was extremely helpful.  We appreciate all they have done.

reviews.text: Joe and his team were very supportive and professional throughout the process of my divorce. They responded to all my questions and concerns in a timely way, and I am very appreciative of their kindness and professionalism. Great team all around to work with! 10/10 recommend!

reviews.text: Working with Joe Lewis and his team was truly an excellent experience. Joe was very caring, kind, but also direct and set clear expectations for all the eventualities in my divorce case. He guided me through a settlement that allowed my family to avoid a trial. Had we gone to a trial, I have zero doubt our results would have been amazing. I highly recommend Joe and his team if you're looking for the best navigation through your worst possible days!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the kind and gracious words, Ben.  I am grateful to have had the opportunity to represent you and wish you the very best moving forward.

reviews.text:
I had the very best experience with Port City Legal.  I have a complex family law case, which also includes meeting with a lot of attorneys over the years.

Attorney Lewis treated me and my case with the utmost professionalism, expertise, integrity, and compassion.  He was always easy to communicate with, and very transparent.  I was cared for, advocated for, and supported throughout my entire experience by the whole firm.  Joe is a razor sharp skilled attorney who will fiercely advocate for what is right, striking a balance with exceptional legal strategy, and always place my child at the forefront of all decisions.  Joe makes this look easy.  However, there are so many times where there are paradoxes in the family law legal system, that make a singular focus almost impossible.  With Joe, there are always possibilities and a pathway forward that keeps the integrity of the child’s best interest at heart.  He makes this into an art form.

Erin and Taylor were absolutely amazing to me.  Whenever I communicated with them, I felt supported with such warmth.
They both knew my case, and are so efficient, professional, and willing to go above and beyond.  During my two day trial, both Erin and Taylor were so incredibly supportive.  They showed up for me in ways that exceed all expectations.  I felt so nervous preparing and attending trial, and I felt like they were holding my hand throughout it all.

I am forever grateful for Attorney Lewis accepting my case.  Due to the legal challenges, and complexity of my case the end result took over two years to accomplish.  Attorney Lewis and his team stayed dedicated, and determined to a favorable outcome.  The striking difference between Port City Legal, and all of the other firms that I have encountered, is that Attorney Lewis and his team believed in me.  There were times in my case, when I thought that I should give up.  They were always there to comfort, support, and motivate me.  This team helped me to keep my hope alive, when I needed it most.  This kind of kindness is extremely rare in family law.  It is easy to become jaded to the system, for both professionals and parents.  Joe and his team rise above the challenges, and always forged a path forward.

I give my highest recommendation to this firm.  My outcome was beyond my wildest dreams.  The team is so dedicated, and truly committed to the best interest of the family.  Throughout the stress and tears of seemingly endless setbacks, Attorney Lewis would find a way to bring laughter and a smile to my face, and help me to shift my perspective.  I am a better person for knowing and working with Joe and his team.

Thank you so very much for your dedication, hard work, and heart that you gave my case.  I cannot thank you enough.

All the best,

Brenda Bartucca
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brenda. You honor us with your words. Every now and then a client and a case comes our way that invites the best of us as a firm. Thank you for allowing us to represent your interests. I know you will continue to put every effort into your family at every turn. Remember always that we are right here, prepared to be at your side and guarding your back!
- Joe

reviews.text: I highly recommend Mary Ellen Sullivan as an estate lawyer.  She handled the legal issues involved in my husband's estate with knowledge, skill, and professionalism.  She was always willing to answer my questions and provided expert legal advice.  Mary Ellen was also a strong advocate for me with the issues that required negotiation with my husband's family and legal counsel.  She remained objective and respected my decisions throughout the long process of settling his estate.  I appreciated her perspective and sense of humor which made a difficult time easier.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Karen, for taking the time to leave a review for Maryellen.  It can be really hard for people to select attorneys generally and I think that this sort of review really helps people separate the wheat from the chafe.  I know Maryellen will be excited to hear about your feedback!

reviews.text: Port City Legal seemed understanding at first and I enjoyed my direct communications with Joe. Over the next 8 months I received invoices for a few and then a no contact. There was zero follow up from email and phone calls for simple items and an ongoing eight month email chain where Joe, Erin, or the billing side refused to follow up. Currently seeking another lawyer to get the retainer back or at least tied up in a legal situation such that Port City does not have those funds available due to abandonment of their client.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Patrick.  I'm sorry that you had the experience with us that you had, though I don't agree with your recollection of how things went over the course of our time together.  I do want to reassure you that your retainer check is ~already~ in the mail and was put in the mail as soon as you requested it.  I hope you have better success moving forward.

reviews.text: My husband and I needed a special needs trust, durable POA’s and wills. Previously we had worked with another local law firm where we waited an eternity to 1) get an appt 2) get any information. “Enough of this” I said! I Googled Port City Legal and Mary Ellen Sullivan called the next day. And we saw her in 2 weeks and had our documents 2 weeks after that! She was an absolute delight to work with. We walked in, unsure of what we needed and ignorant of the process and she patiently and professionally (with her vast legal knowledge) guided us in the right direction. She made the daunting process seem very simple and straightforward for a very reasonable fee. Mary Ellen is so personable, upbeat and knows her law inside and out and we had the most positive, satisfying experience with her and all the staff in the office. HIGHLY recommend Port City Legal and the incredible Mary Ellen Sullivan!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Brenda.  It was so nice of you to take the time to write a review of Maryellen.  I know she was really appreciative to have you and your husband as clients and so am I.  Thanks for choosing Port City Legal!

Don't waste your time, not a minute of it.
A wonderful experience. Professional, informative, understanding, and fairly price. I am so glad I went with Attorney David Azarian.
I was in car accident in lee nh.  They took my case when other wouldnt and got me more then expected.

I was in a bad car accident at the traffic circle in Portsmouth and wasn't sure about what would be next that would need to be done legally, I was recommended by a friend to go see attorney David Azarian and that he would be able to help me and that he was excellent in helping people like myself in the same situation and I thought about it should I call the guy on TV promising me free consultation or this local Attorney with a name I could barely pronounce and is he going to give me a free consultation like Joe said he would? but then again the person that recommended him to me did use the word excellent and if he doesn't offer free consultation I could always call some guy name Joe on TV, so I gave it a shot and called Attorney David Azarian, and he listened to my situation briefly over the phone and before I knew it I had me an attorney that took the reigns and told me what he could do to help me and the results that he said he could help me with and to leave it to him and boy, I'm so glad I met him that day he never stopped working for me and always with my best interests in mind he exemplifys what a awesome lawyer truly is and came through with everything he said he could do for me and fast I'm certainly glad I didn't call that attorney 1-800 call what's his name that I seen on TV that day with the free consultation but instead I called Attorney David Azarian he will get the job done Quickly (I actually could pronounce his name when he was done with my case)

I needed to refer a client to a bankruptcy attorney and Attorney Azarian not only took the case on short notice, but quickly and effectively got up to speed on a complicated matter, filed well reasoned and strategically sound pleadings, and successfully had the case dismissed. I would not think twice before referring another client to him.

I was stuck in a frustrating cycle of delays, lies, and stonewalling with a local auto group. I very much felt like the little guy up against a goliath that did not care about me in the least. After trying to get a resolution myself for months, I reached out to David Azarian, who, within a couple weeks, had achieved for me a more than satisfactory result in the matter. He cared about my problem, tackled it like his own, and brought about a swift and satisfactory resolution. Can't recommend him enough!

Attorney Azarian  represented my firm recently in a complicated business matter.  I found him to be extremely thorough, attentive, and well versed in understanding and managing complex business transactions. He helped me avert a potentially devastating outcome.  Thanks to Attorney Azarian my business was repositioned for success and is once again, thriving!  I highly recommend him without reservation!
My first experience with hiring a lawyer was great. Very helpful with my situation. Made the process easy and comfortable for me.
Pleasure to work with and very responsive. Definitely could not have done it without his help!

Phenomenal attorney, very responsive through emails and calls. Has multiple sit downs to understand your case and needs. Very good at making all aspects of the case clear and understandable. Highly recommend!

Azarian Law Office was able to help me quickly settle a legal matter. He explains things very well and answers any questions that you may have. David Azarian and his team are very good. Whenever I called, he always called me back. They are a very hard working and great advocates to have on your side. They also listen and very empathetic to your case. I have used them twice now and looking to use them again going forward.

MY brother engaged David Azarian's services 5 years ago and David did a great job, he quickly responded to any and all questions my brother or I had about the ongoing process. This man is a class act.

I don’t know if I will need to use Attorney Azarian for my situation, however I would hire this attorney if I find myself needing his expertise.
Can’t thank David Azarian enough for helping me navigate through these past few years. Incredibly helpful and responsive. Would certainly recommend.

David Azarian did a phenomenal job on every aspect of my case. I went into it intimidated by the entire process and was quickly put at ease. All of my emails and calls were returned promptly and David handled everything with a calm confidence that only comes with experience. Incredibly fair rates and fantastic service from a true expert.

Working with David was an absolute joy! I found him extremely knowledgeable and easy going - which was exactly what I needed in my situation. David was always super responsive and made the legal process simple to understand. I cannot recommend him highly enough.

Very happy with David - I had a concerning issue related to a real estate transaction and contacted ~10 firms in the sea coast area. David contacted me back promptly, and helped to resolve things for me. Thank you!
Very knowledgeable, kind, & responsive. Patient and explained everything to me through the entire process. Ty for all your help!

Dave Azarian Law Firm ROCKS!!! I had a personal injury claim that was dismissed by another law firm. I contacted Azarian Law after being referred by a friend that had prior experience there. I highly recommend this firm they are friendly, diligent, and very personable. Five stars all the way!
Steve is a great guy, very smart lawyer

reviews.text: I’m going to cut to the chase here and give 5 stars to Berman and Simmons! My experience with this law firm has been exceptional from day one of meeting with Attorney Michael Bigos to the final settlements. I’m a survivor of some serious trauma and was initially nervous about calling a law firm. However, I learned that Attorney Bigos has aquired specialized training to understand the effects of trauma on individuals, and how to recognize signs of trauma in order to create a safe and supportive environment to best represent his clients. Attorney Bigos understands that trauma can significantly impact a person’s communication, behavior, and ability to navigate the legal system. I had no worries with Attorney Bigos on my side, because it wasn’t just him caring about my case… I had a team at this law firm! When you first call Berman and Simmons there will be an intake from a Paralegal that will listen to your situation. I spoke with Erika Lindstrom (Paralegal for Attorney Bigos) who provided a very calming environment and clear communication, which made me feel comfortable and safe. Most importantly, I felt believed, and was provided with support groups (as well as other resources) to help me heal. I didn’t expect that, and was very pleased with all the extra that Berman and Simmons provided to me. They totally went above and beyond. Moreover, Attorney Joseph Gousse was close by to assist. A trauma-trained lawyer as well, Joseph was present for meetings to help; and, from the first moment we met, his personal aura radiated as truly genuine. I highly recommend Berman and Simmons for any personal injury case that has caused you trauma. I feel like a giant weight has been lifted off my shoulders. Thank you, Berman and Simmons!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Leigh,

We appreciate you getting straight to the point and providing this incredibly thoughtful review about Attorneys Mike Bigos and Joe Gousse, and their team! The trauma-informed training our attorneys and staff has received sets us apart from other law firms and allowed us to provide a comfortable, safe and calming environment for your healing and recovery. Beyond the injury, we look at the whole person to make sure we’re supporting all their needs. We’re so happy that giant weight was lifted off your shoulders and you had such a positive experience with us.

Thank you for sharing your feedback and making sure others know about the services.

We strive to treat every client with professionalism, respect, and candor. We are sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations. Clear communication and mutual understanding are important in any attorney-client relationship, and when a client chooses to move in a different direction, we respect that decision.

Because of our ethical obligations and the duty of confidentiality owed to all current and former clients, we cannot address or discuss any specific facts, strategy decisions, fee arrangements, or communications in a public forum. What we can say is that our firm approaches every matter thoughtfully, evaluates the information provided to us, and advises clients based on our professional judgment and the applicable law.

Regarding your concerns about privacy, we take client confidentiality seriously and operate in compliance with all professional and legal standards.

If you wish to discuss your situation or concerns further, please do not hesitate to contact us. We would be happy to hear your side where it can be discussed further.

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your frustration and understand how upsetting it can be when expectations aren’t met during an already difficult situation.

The purpose of a consultation is to review the details of your particular circumstances and determine, based on that information, whether our firm is the right fit to take the case. In some instances, after a thorough review, we may determine that we’re unable to move forward with representation. When that happens, it’s not a reflection of the importance of the matter, but rather our professional obligation to be honest and ethical about whether we can meaningfully assist.

We also understand your concerns regarding scheduling and communication and take feedback like this seriously. We would welcome the opportunity to review what occurred and ensure our consultation process and expectations were handled appropriately.

If you’d like to discuss this further, please contact our office directly and ask to speak with management. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention and wish you the best moving forward.
