Last Spring my husband was in a car accident caused by a distracted teenage driver resulting in severe physical injury (3 fractured ribs), requiring an ambulance transfer to the ER, and subsequent transfer to a trauma hospital.  His injuries required a hospital stay, and subsequent shoulder surgery due to damage sustained as a result of the accident.

I did an extensive search for injury lawyers, and based on several highly recommended reviews, chose Bain Testa to represent my husband.

Our experience with Bain has been nothing short of exceptional.
Bain handled each detail of the case personally.  He was extremely responsive, and patiently and thoroughly worked with us on every detail of the case.  Despite the many challenges of working through the case (particularly working with multiple insurance companies and medical providers) his persistence paid off, and we received a considerable settlement that would not have been possible without his hard work.

We highly recommend Bain to anyone looking for a dedicated, hard working attorney that will persistently work to ensure his clients receive the compensation they deserve as a result of the negligence of others.
Bain helped me from beginning to end, very thorough and very personable. Never had to go looking for them. I would recommend him highly I'm glad that I did!

He navigated the complex legal system with ease, anticipating challenges and addressing them proactively. His communication was prompt and transparent, keeping me informed at every turn. Beyond his legal expertise, his empathy and commitment to fighting for my rights made all the difference. I wholeheartedly give him five stars and would recommend his services to anyone in need of a disability attorney who truly goes above and beyond.   Thank you Bain for everything.

John Whitten was able to firmly and professionally put the plaintiff in her place, demonstrating that he means business through his conduct. Throughout the process, he made me feel like a valued and important client. I can confidently say that I trust him completely to handle any legal issues or circumstances that may arise in the future.

I’m not sure what else to say. I am just mind blown with his defense. One of the kindest people I have also come to know in this short period of time.

I had an truly excellent experience working with Cameron E. Tillis as my criminal speeding lawyer in Maine. From the very beginning, he was professional, knowledgeable, and reassuring during a very stressful time for me.

He was successful in reducing criminal speeding charge to a civil ticket at the very first court arraignment date. In just 2 weeks, he resolved the entire case and helped me move forward without the burden of the charge hanging over me.

Throughout the process, Cameron was responsive, clear in his communication, and confident in his strategy. His expertise and dedication made a huge difference in the outcome of my case. I am extremely grateful for his work and would highly recommend him to anyone in need of a skilled and effective defense lawyer in Maine.

I was recently charged in the state of Maine with Theft by Unauthorized Taking, and it was an extremely traumatic experience for both me and my family. I immediately began searching for a criminal defense attorney who could help me navigate a stressful and complicated judicial system. From the very beginning, Mr. Ellis went above and beyond—he even took time during his own family vacation to learn about my case and answer my questions.

Mr. Ellis brought not only extensive legal knowledge, but also genuine compassion and honesty. I always felt supported and reassured throughout the process. He made himself consistently available to address my many questions, no matter how small, which made an overwhelming situation far more manageable.

There was a great deal at stake—my reputation, career, and future ambitions were all on the line. Thanks to Mr. Ellis’s skill, dedication, and tenacity, we were ultimately able to get the case dismissed!

I am incredibly grateful for Mr. Ellis and the hard work he put into my defense. I would strongly recommend him to anyone in need of criminal defense representation without hesitation!
Cameron Ellis is very professional and kind and patient. If you need a lawyer, choose him.

I was charged with criminal speeding in Maine (alleged speed of 43 MPH over the limit) for a brief moment of pure stupidity. I had a clean record and was never pulled over for any reason before. As a young person with strong personal & professional aspirations, I was terrified that any criminal conviction would prove devastating for my future.

Over the course of a few months, Cameron and I corresponded over 150 times to go over all aspects of the case and strategize to create the most persuasive defense. Thanks to Cameron's help and guidance, my case was dismissed as quickly as possible well before the dispositional conference (second court date) without me needing to appear before a judge or physically go to court at all.

This is noteworthy as a full dismissal (without even a civil speeding ticket issued) was the unlikely but best possible outcome for the case, especially given the alleged speed.

This was not an easy process, but it was one that was made as clear and streamlined as possible thanks to Cameron's knowledge and experience. I found him to be open and communicative during the entire process. He is empathetic and respectful, and developed a thoughtful and unique strategy that worked out fantastically for my unique case.

I am thrilled with this result and am relieved that I can put this all behind me. This case was a stressful situation, and I've certainly learned my own personal lesson with this experience. I highly recommend Cameron for legal representation in similar cases for criminal speeding and beyond in Maine.

Several months ago, I got an OUI. It was just after a devastating breakup, and I wasn't in my right frame of mind. It was the dumbest thing I have ever done. Going to get toothpaste almost cost me my entire life as I knew it. I was terrified. I reached out to Attorney Cameron T. Ellis for a consultation. Immediately I could tell he was passionate about helping me and his bedside manner was calming and took the sting out of this awful situation right away. Attorney Ellis took on my case. The cards were completely stacked against me, and the burden of proof was self-evident. Over the next few months Attorney Ellis kept in close contact and carefully and patiently explained every detail as they arose. I have never even gotten a J-walking ticket, so I was scared out of my wits for having done something so irresponsible and dangerous. Attorney Ellis was highly professional, extremely articulate without being condescending at all. I felt at once as if I had made the correct choice. I kept my focus on sobriety and community service and taking the required steps to meet conditions set by the court and the BMV. After months of carefully planned moves and an amazing amount of communication virtually on a weekly basis Attorney Ellis was successful in convincing not only the BMV to drop the Aggravated OUI charge, but the Court as well. I could not have possibly chosen a better defense attorney, and I would deeply and sincerely recommend Attorney Cameron T. Ellis to anyone facing the worst of the worst like I was. Cameron, you are incredible and I will never be able to thank you enough for helping me not only fight the charges, but being an incredible support in my life changes, my sobriety (well beyond 200 days), and helping me realize how fragile life can be, but if we stay the course and stay true to ourselves and make healthy decisions, we have the best possible chance at winning. At the end Attorney Ellis wasn't just my lawyer, he was a positive influence on my continued focus and personal success. Thank you, Attorney Ellis!!!

Cameron Ellis was wonderful to work with, very professional, communicative, and helpful through the whole legal process. He made working through my own legal circumstances easy and was genuine and authentic in his approach. I highly recommend him and his practice.

My experience with Attorney Ellis was better than I ever could have hoped for!

I was charged with shoplifting in Maine, and my clean record was very much in jeopardy, but with Attorney Ellis's help and guidance, my case was *dismissed outright* two weeks after the first court date and almost 4 months before the Dispositional Conference. I never even had to go to court.

When I was arrested, I was in a state of flat-out panic, but from the very first phone call I received from Attorney Ellis (which came just a few hours after I first reached out), I felt I was in good hands. He put me at ease by calmly and clearly explaining the real risks I was facing (which were serious but not as bad as I imagined they might be) and a clear plan for achieving a positive outcome.

I followed his instructions to the letter, and he delivered a result that was better than I ever imagined possible -- a straight dismissal, which makes it like the whole thing never happened. It will not show up on background checks for job applications or anything.

Throughout the process he was accessible, supportive, kind, and understanding. The success of his representation obviously was the most important thing he provided, but his "bedside manner" was nearly as important to me.

I'd recommend Cameron Ellis to anyone in need of legal assistance. I can't remember ever hiring anyone to do anything who exceeded my expectations like this.

Exceptional Maine Criminal Defense Lawyer – Cameron T. Ellis Delivered Results Beyond Expectations

I never imagined a simple drive could turn my life upside down. I was charged with criminal speeding in Maine (108 mph in a 70 mph zone), with a court date in Skowhegan District Court. The charges were so serious that they threatened my Federal Government Security Clearance, my business, and my family’s financial future. My wife and I were devastated, desperate, and terrified of what could come next. We knew we needed the absolute best Maine criminal defense lawyer and the best Maine Criminal Speed lawyer.

From the very first conversation, Attorney Cameron Ellis stood head and shoulders above every other attorney we interviewed, and we spoke to many. He has a unique, phased approach to case strategy that made perfect sense from the moment we spoke with him. It was obvious that he had significant experience with my case type, and his honesty, clarity, and professionalism set him apart from everyone else we consulted. He meticulously reviewed the evidence, identified weaknesses in the State’s case, discussed my circumstances at length to recognize every possible helpful detail, and then advocated relentlessly with the District Attorney on my behalf.

He always spoke to me with compassion, empathy, insight, and was deeply attuned to the human side of my case.

In the end, thanks to Attorney Cameron Ellis’s persistent and skillful advocacy, the District Attorney ultimately declined to prosecute any charges against me. I walked away with my clean record intact, my Government Clearance preserved, and my business secure. An outcome far beyond what my wife and I could have hoped for.

Attorney Cameron Ellis’s expertise in Maine criminal speeding cases, knowledge of court procedures, and attention to detail made all the difference.  Attorney Ellis proved to be an exceptionally gifted Maine criminal defense lawyer; he clearly understood the law and the most important facts of my case.

We couldn't be happier!

If you’re facing a Maine criminal speeding charge, a dangerous driving case, or any serious driving offense in Maine, as I did, I strongly recommend Attorney Cameron T. Ellis.

I can fully understand the frustration that any litigant feels when their case appears to be dragging on longer than it seems it should, or when the results are not what were expected, and rarely is any litigant not affected personally by their involvement in a court proceeding. Emotions often run high and we certainly understand that. We truly care for our clients and remain committed to doing everything that we can to help resolve their cases to their benefit. Unfortunately, some cases resolve in a way that was unexpected, or end up being drawn out by forces outside of even our control. We understand that those situations can make things very difficult for our clients, who are already going through a lot simply by their involvement in litigation, and a certain level of frustration is expected. It is our hope that through communication and our efforts on their behalf we can help guide our clients through those times and ease the strain this causes them.

Attorney Rancourt, his paralegal Anna, and the team at this firm helped us ensure a stable, loving, safe, and happy upbringing for my child. It was a long contested adoption over the well-being of my nephew and earlier this year my partner and I got to officially adopt our son. The team was always empathetic, kind, supportive, responsive, and considerate no matter how many things (some entirely insane) came up in our case. They were firm about the laws that pertained to our situation, consistently aided us in our fight for what is best for our very young child, held stern in our multi day hearings, and kept us updated during every step. I’m eternally grateful for their services and the support they provided us through the multi-year process. I’m also in an entirely different state and could still consistently rely on them to ensure everything was handled effectively. Our child’s future being the best it possibly could be is thanks to me trusting this company.

They assisted us with a contested adoption from foster care as well as handling the appeal process the other party started after our adoption was finalized. Being able to trust them with every single thing we needed from start to finish was a huge relief and I cannot say enough about how much of a difference they made by being our representation.
This law firm does not even deserve one star! If you are a female client looking to hire a male lawyer from this firm … I suggest you run!

reviews.text: Put in an inquiry for a consultation on a legal matter. Received a reply back that not only could they not help, but couldnt refer us to another law office in the area who could discuss with us. Not sure who uses them, but they dont seem to be a helpful law practice
Their staff is top shelf, and the lawyer that I worked with in their facility has restored my faith in lawyers on the good guys side.
I believed him when he said he could help me protect my property rights. He did not. For this and one phone call, he charged me $1000. I would suggest not hiring him for anything.

I am disappointed with the representation I received. Neil Jamieson did not take the time to understand my son’s medical & educational needs, despite multiple providers expressing serious concerns with documented abuse from a physician where my ex was escorted out of a medical office. Key information about his diagnosis, school struggles, & recommended treatment was not effectively presented to the court. My expectation was much higher from an attorney who helped develop the Kids First program that the court mandates for co-parenting. Instead, my son’s needs were overlooked in the final order resulting in continued struggles for him & I am still left trying to co-parent with someone who refuses necessary treatment & support. I expected stronger advocacy & better preparation, especially for a child with documented disabilities & especially for the amount of money Neil was overpaid. After the judge ruled, Neil started ignoring my e-mails where I am simply asking for direction on how to proceed to get my son the help & accommodations that 6 medical providers have documented as their recommendations. This was a huge part of our 2 day trial & there is no ruling or direction in the final paperwork from the judge about my son's medical needs. I am not a lawyer but I do expect that when you have to pay a lawyer more money than you paid for your car that they would have some compassion.
Kind people, great result!

I had a consultation scheduled, with Neil Jamieson, and arrived 15 minutes early and had taken the day off for this. The receptionist was cold, which I brushed off. Neil was 10 minutes late, then informed me (in a condescending tone) that the appointment was actually scheduled for yesterday, saying “we’ll take the blame for that miscommunication.” I double-checked — it wasn’t on my end, I would have loved to have yesterday off as it was my partner's birthday.

During our initial phone consult, he spoke to me in a judgmental tone, asking “how on earth did you agree to this??” wlHe showed little empathy or professionalism.

After the mix-up, he asked when I could see him next. I agreed to meet later that same day when he offered, but he immediately added “it’ll be tight.” When I asked about next week, he had to “go upstairs and check his schedule” — despite having a receptionist, which felt disorganized. He eventually said “next Thursday” without clarifying a time.

Looking at other reviews, I’ve noticed a pattern: glowing praise from men, and poor experiences from women. I felt disrespected, rushed, and not taken seriously. I will be finding a different attorney.

Hunter Tzovarras is a good attorney.  He represented me in a drunk driving prosecution.  The prosecutor for Penobscott County, Maine has run on a zero tolerance for DUI campaign platform and will not settle these prosecutions.  I took a blood test that allegedly showed I had a BAC level significantly below the legal limit of 0.08%.  The state then destroyed the blood sample without giving me a chance to test it and after misplacing it and creating other chain of custody issues.  Nonetheless, the state continued to insist that I plead guilty to drunk driving and throw myself to the mercy of the prosecution and the court.  That was obviously unacceptable.

Mr. Tzovarras kept his cool and we waited out the prosecution because they clearly did not want to take my case to court and lose.  (The prosecutor clearly respected Mr. Tzovarras.)  Eventually, we got the charges dismissed on speedy trial grounds after the prosecution failed to bring my case to trial for 3 1/2 years.  I am so thankful to Mr. Tzovarras for helping me with this matter.
Hunter went above and beyond for me. His performance in court was excellent. Happy to have you representing me.
